powers.name: Evil Eye Defense
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from a non-adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

powers.name: Tetsubo Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose one figure adjacent to the targeted figure to be affected by the Tetsubo Special Attack as well. Roll attack dice once for both figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

powers.name: Poison Sting Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 4. If Sujoah inflicts at least 1 wound with Poison Sting Special Attack, roll the 20-sided die for Poison Damage. If you roll 1-9, the defending figure receives no additional wounds for Poison Damage. If you roll 10-19, add 1 additional wound marker to the defending figure's Army Card, and roll again for Poison Damage. If you roll a 20, destroy the defending figure.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Sujoah's movement, ignore elevations. Sujoah may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Sujoah starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Coil Crush
powers.text: When attacking a small, medium or large figure, if Wo-Sa-Ga inflicts at least 2 wounds, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, destroy the defending figure.

powers.name: Slither
powers.text: Wo-Sa-Ga does not have to stop her movement when entering water spaces.

powers.name: Majestic Fires Special Attack
powers.text: Range 7. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the targeted figure are also affected by Majestic Fires Special Attack. Common Squad figures roll 2 less defense dice against Majestic Fires Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Zelrig cannot be affected by his own Majestic Fires Special Attack.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Zelrig's movement, ignore elevations. Zelrig may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Zelrig starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Deadly Shot
powers.text: When attacking with Zetacron, each skull rolled counts for one additional hit.

powers.name: Leaf of the Home Tree Aura
powers.text: When any Elf you control within 8 clear sight spaces of Acolarh receives enough wounds to be destroyed, you may roll 10 Ullar Valkyrie dice before removing the figure. If you roll at least 3 Ullar symbols, ignore any wounds that figure just received. Acolarh's Leaf of the Home Tree Aura does not affect Acolarh.

powers.name: Ullar's Amulet
powers.text: All friendly figures who follow Ullar and start their turn adjacent to Acolarh may move 2 additional spaces.

powers.name: Heroic Defense Aura
powers.text: When defending against a normal attack by an adjacent figure with any Samurai or Ashigaru figures you control within 8 clear sight spaces of Hatamoto Taro, you may roll Einar Valkyrie dice. Each Einar symbol rolled counts as an additional shield. Heroic Defense Aura does not affect Hatamoto Taro.

powers.name: Adjacent Tough 1
powers.text: When rolling defense dice for Hatamoto Taro, if Hatamoto Taro is adjacent to at least one figure you control who follows Einar, add one automatic shield to the defense roll.

powers.name: Vydar's Range Enhancement Aura
powers.text: All friendly figures with a Range number of 4 or more who follow Vydar and are within 4 clear sight spaces of Laglor add 2 to their Range number. Vydar's Range Enhancement Aura does not affect Laglor.

powers.name: Autoload Special Attack
powers.text: Range 7. Attack 3. When attacking with Autoload Special Attack, you may roll Vydar Valkyrie dice. If you roll at least one Vydar symbol, you may attack again using Autoload Special Attack.

powers.name: Red Flag of Fury Aura
powers.text: If Order Marker 1 is placed on Ornak, then instead of taking that turn with Ornak, you may take a turn with up to 2 Unique Heroes you control who follow Utgar. Ornak cannot be one of the 2 Unique Heroes. Any Unique Hero that is taking a turn instead of Ornak must be within 8 clear sight spaces of Ornak prior to its movement.

powers.name: Orc Battle Cry Aura
powers.text: When attacking with any Orc Warrior figures you control within 2 clear sight spaces of Ornak, you may roll Utgar Valkyrie dice. Each Utgar symbol rolled counts for an additional skull.

powers.name: Jandar's Dispatch
powers.text: After you take a turn with Sir Gilbert, you may roll 12 Jandar Valkyrie dice. Move up to 4 squad figures you control who follow Jandar up to X spaces. X equals the number of Jandar symbols rolled. Any squad figures moved with Jandar's Dispatch must be within 8 clear sight spaces of Sir Gilbert prior to moving.

powers.name: Attack Aura 1
powers.text: All friendly figures adjacent to Sir Gilbert with a range of 1 add 1 die to their normal attack.

powers.name: Turn Undead Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 4. Turn Undead Special Attack can be used to attack only Undead figures.

powers.name: Protection from Evil Aura
powers.text: All small or medium figures you control within 3 clear sight spaces of Ana Karithon add 1 to their defense dice when rolling defense against an attack from a figure who follows Utgar. Ana Karithon's Protection from Evil Aura does not affect Ana Karithon.

powers.name: Healing Word
powers.text: After revealing an Order Marker on a wounded small or medium Hero figure you control that is adjacent to Ana Karithon, and before using any other special powers on any Army Card or Glyph, you may first roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-12, nothing happens. If you roll a 13 or higher, remove up to 2 wound markers from that Hero's Army Card.

powers.name: Sneak Attack 2
powers.text: If Darrak Ambershard is attacking an opponent's figure that is adjacent to at least one other figure you control, add 2 dice to Darrak Ambershard's attack.

powers.name: Disarm Traps
powers.text: When you roll the 20-sided die for a Treasure Glyph trap with Darrak Ambershard, you may add 4 to your die roll.

powers.name: Hide In Darkness
powers.text: If Darrak Ambershard is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If Darrak Ambershard is on a dungeon space, add 3 to your die roll. If he is on a shadow space, add 6 to your die roll. If you roll a 1-15, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 16 or higher, ignore all damage that would be inflicted by the attack.

powers.name: Poison Weapons
powers.text: Each time a Deepwyrm Drow attacks a small, medium, or large Hero with a normal attack or a leaving engagement attack and inflicts at least 1 wound, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-11, nothing happens. If you roll a 12 or higher, add 1 additional wound to the defending figure.

powers.name: Hide in Darkness
powers.text: If a Deepwyrm Drow is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If that Deepwyrm Drow is on a dungeon space, add 3 to your die roll. If it is on a shadow space, add 6 to your die roll. If you roll a 1-15, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 16 or higher, ignore all damage that would be inflicted by the attack.

powers.name: Fire Blast Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack Special. Each time you attack with Erevan Sunshadow's Fire Blast Special Attack, you may choose to roll 2, 3, or 4 attack dice. If a skull is rolled on every die, you may attack again with Erevan Sunshadow's Fire Blast Special Attack. You may continue attacking with Erevan Sunshadow's Fire Blast Special Attack until you do not roll a skull on every die.

powers.name: Fey Step
powers.text: Once per game, Erevan Sunshadow may use Fey Step. Before moving normally with Erevan Sunshadow, you may place him on any empty space within 5 spaces of his current location. If Erevan Sunshadow is engaged when he uses Fey Step, he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Blood Frenzy
powers.text: When attacking with this Feral Troll, it receives 1 extra attack die for each wound marker on the defending figure's Army Card, to a maximum of 3 additional attack dice for Blood Frenzy.

powers.name: Regenerate
powers.text: After taking a turn with this Feral Troll, remove 1 Wound Marker from this Feral Troll's Army Card.

powers.name: Acid Spray Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose up to two other figures adjacent to the targeted figure to be affected by Acid Spray Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

powers.name: Lurking Ambush
powers.text: If Othkurik starts his turn unengaged and on at least one shadow or swamp water space, for this turn add 1 to Othkurik's movement and add 3 to his Attack value.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Othkurik's movement, ignore elevations. Othkurik may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If Othkurik is engaged when he starts to fly, he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Lolth's Wrath Special Attack
powers.text: Range Special Attack 3. Choose a Drow figure you control that is within 5 clear sight spaces of Pelloth and roll 3 attack dice. One at a time for each skull rolled, you may inflict 1 wound on any small or medium figure that is within 2 clear sight spaces of the chosen Drow figure. You may inflict more than 1 wound on a single figure using Lolth's Wrath Special Attack. Figures affected by Lolth's Wrath Special Attack cannot roll any defense dice. After attacking with Lolth's Wrath Special Attack, destroy the chosen Drow figure.

powers.name: Lurk in Shadows
powers.text: If Pelloth is on a shadow space, opponents' figures must be adjacent to attack him with a normal attack.

powers.name: +2 Broadsword
powers.text: If Tandros Kreel is attacking an adjacent figure, add 2 dice to Tandros Kreel's attack.

powers.name: Cleave
powers.text: When Tandros Kreel attacks an adjacent figure, you may choose one Squad figure that is also adjacent to Tandros Kreel. If the defending figure receives any wounds from Tandros Kreel's attack, the chosen figure receives 1 wound.

powers.name: Combat Challenge
powers.text: If an opponent's figure that is adjacent to Tandros Kreel attacks with a normal or special attack, it must attack Tandros Kreel.

powers.name: Super Leap
powers.text: Instead of his normal move, Abomination may Super Leap. Super Leap has a move of 10. When counting spaces for Abomination's Super Leap movement, ignore elevations. Abomination may leap over water without stopping, leap over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Abomination may not leap more than 50 levels up or down in a single leap. If Abomination is engaged when he starts to leap, he will take any leaving engagement attacks. Abomination rolls 3 less attack dice on any turn that he chooses to Super Leap.

powers.name: Stomp Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3. Any figure adjacent to Abomination is affected by the Stomp Special Attack. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense separately. Abomination cannot attack using his Stomp Special Attack on the same turn he uses Super Leap.

powers.name: Shield Throw Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 4. When Captain America attacks with his Shield Throw Special Attack, he may attack 2 additional times. He cannot attack the same figure more than once.

powers.name: Tactician
powers.text: All friendly figures adjacent to Captain America add 1 extra die to their attack, and 1 extra die to their defense.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

powers.name: Mind Exchange 17
powers.text: After taking a turn with Doctor Doom, you may choose any Unique Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Doctor Doom. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 17 or higher, take temporary control of that hero and immediately take a turn with the chosen Hero. At the end of that turn, control of the chosen Hero returns to the player who controlled the Hero before the Mind Exchange. All Order Markers that were on the chosen Hero's card will stay on the card.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Doctor Doom's movement, ignore elevations. Doctor Doom may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Doctor Doom starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Rage Smash 5
powers.text: When Incredible Hulk attacks using a normal attack, he receives one extra attack die for each Wound Marker he has, up to a maximum of 5 extra attack dice for Rage Smash.

powers.name: Super Leap
powers.text: Instead of his normal move, Incredible Hulk may Super Leap. Super Leap has a move of 10. When counting spaces for Hulk's Super Leap movement, ignore elevations. Hulk may leap over water without stopping, leap over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Hulk may not leap more than 50 levels up or down in a single leap. If Hulk is engaged when he starts to leap, he will take any leaving engagement attacks. Hulk rolls 3 less attack dice on any turn that he chooses to Super Leap.

powers.name: Stomp Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3. Any figure adjacent to Incredible Hulk is affected by the Stomp Special Attack. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense separately. Hulk cannot attack using his Stomp Special Attack on the same turn he uses Super Leap.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: When Iron Man attacks, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Iron Man's movement, ignore elevations. Iron Man may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Iron Man starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Master Manipulator
powers.text: After revealing an Order Marker on Red Skull's card, instead of taking that turn with Red Skull, you may take a turn with any Unique Hero you control within clear sight of Red Skull.

powers.name: Dust-of-Death
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may either: • Roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to Red Skull, or • Roll the 20-sided die once for any one figure up to 3 clear sight spaces away. If you roll a 19 or higher, that figure is destroyed.

powers.name: Stealth Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Silver Surfer's movement, ignore elevations. Silver Surfer may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Silver Surfer starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Cosmic Force Blast Special Attack
powers.text: Range 6. Attack 6. If an opponent's Unique Hero receives at least one wound from the Cosmic Force Blast Special Attack, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may remove one unrevealed Order Marker at random from that Unique Hero's Army Card.

powers.name: Hyper Speed 5
powers.text: After taking a turn with Silver Surfer, Silver Surfer may move up to an additional 5 spaces. Silver Surfer cannot use Hyper Speed 5 if he attacked with his Cosmic Force Blast Special Attack during that turn.

powers.name: Spidey-Sense 11
powers.text: If Spider-Man is attacked by an opponent's figure and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-10, roll defense dice normally. If you roll an 11-20, Spider-Man takes no damage and may immediately move using his Swing Line 4 Special Power.

powers.name: Swing Line 4
powers.text: Instead of a normal move, Spider-Man may use his Swing Line. Swing Line has a move of 4. When counting spaces for Spider-Man's Swing Line movement, ignore elevations. Spider-Man may swing over water without stopping, swing over figures without becoming engaged, and swing over obstacles such as ruins. Spider-Man may not Swing Line more than 40 levels up or down in a single Swing Line. If Spider-Man is engaged when he starts to Swing Line, he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Web Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 3. Figures roll 1 less defense die when defending against Spider-Man's Web Special Attack.

powers.name: Rejected by Death
powers.text: At the start of each of your turns after Thanos has been destroyed, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 19 or higher, immediately place Thanos on a space adjacent to any figure you control and remove all Wound Markers on Thanos' card.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Thanos' movement, ignore elevations. Thanos may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Thanos starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Spider-Sense 14
powers.text: If Venom is attacked by an opponent's figure and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-13, roll defense normally. If you roll a 14-20, Venom takes no damage and instead may immediately move using his Swing Line 4 Special Power.

powers.name: Swing Line 4
powers.text: Instead of a normal move, Venom may use his Swing Line. Swing Line has a move of 4. When counting spaces for Venom's Swing Line movement, ignore elevations. Venom may swing over water without stopping, swing over figures without becoming engaged, and swing over obstacles such as ruins. Venom may not Swing Line more than 40 levels up or down in a single Swing Line. If Venom is engaged when he starts to Swing Line, he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Web Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 3. Figures roll 1 less defense die when defending against Web Special Attack.

powers.name: Carry
powers.text: Before moving Brunak, choose an unengaged friendly small or medium figure adjacent to Brunak. After you move Brunak, place the chosen figure adjacent to Brunak.

powers.name: Blood Hungry Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 4. If Brunak's Blood Hungry Special Attack destroys a figure, Brunak may attack again with his Blood Hungry Special Attack. Brunak may continue attacking with his Blood Hungry Special Attack until he does not destroy a figure.

powers.name: Lava Resistant
powers.text: Brunak never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage and he does not have to stop in molten lava spaces.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Charos's movement, ignore elevation. Charos may fly over water without stopping. Charos may pass over figures without becoming engaged. Charos may fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Charos starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Rapid Fire Special Attack
powers.text: Range 7. Attack 3. If Deathwalker's Rapid Fire Special Attack inflicts a wound, he may attack again with his Rapid Fire Special Attack. Deathwalker may continue attacking with his Rapid Fire Special Attack until he does not inflict a wound.

powers.name: Crippling Gaze 15
powers.text: Before moving, you may choose a figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Dünd. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher remove all order markers on the chosen figure's army card (or cards if your opponent has more than one common card for that figure).

powers.name: HIVE SUPREMACY
powers.text: Anytime you roll the 20-sided die for a Marro or Wulsinu Army Card, you may add 1 to your die roll.

powers.name: FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for Su-Bak-Na's movement, ignore elevation. Su-Bak-Na may fly over water without stopping. Su-Bak-Na may pass over figures without becoming engaged. Su-Bak-Na may fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Su-Bak-Na starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Poisonous Acid Breath
powers.text: Instead of attacking, you may choose up to 3 different small or medium figures within 4 clear sight spaces of Braxas. One at a time, roll the 20-sided die for each chosen figure. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll an 8 or higher, destroy it. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Braxas's movement, ignore elevations. Braxas may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Braxas starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Wild Swing Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Wild Swing Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Jotun cannot be affected by his own Wild Swing Special Attack.

powers.name: Throw 14
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, choose one small or medium non-flying figure adjacent to Jotun. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may throw the figure by placing it on any empty space within 4 spaces of Jotun. The figure must land within clear sight of Jotun. After the figure is placed, roll the 20-sided die for throwing damage. If you roll an 11 or higher, the thrown figure receives 2 wounds. If the figure is thrown onto a level higher than the height of Jotun or onto water, do not roll for throwing damage. The thrown figure does not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Queglix Gun Special Attack
powers.text: Range 6. Attack 1, 2 or 3. Major Q9 starts each turn with 9 attack dice. Choose any figure within range and attack by rolling 1, 2 or 3 attack dice. Major Q9 may keep making special attacks with 1, 2 or 3 attack dice until he has rolled all 9 attack dice. Major Q9 may target the same or different figures with each attack.

powers.name: Ice Shard Breath Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5 Attack 4. When Nilfheim attacks with his Ice Shard Breath Special Attack, he may attack 2 additional times. He cannot attack the same figure more than once.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Nilfheim's movement, ignore elevations. Nilfheim may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Nilfheim starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: CARRY
powers.text: Before moving Theracus, choose an unengaged friendly small or medium figure adjacent to Theracus. After you move Theracus, place the chosen figure adjacent to Theracus.

powers.name: FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for Theracus's movement, ignore elevations. Theracus may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Theracus starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Admiral's Orders
powers.text: After rolling for Initiative, you may move any Order Markers from this card onto any of your Pirate or Captain Army Cards.

powers.name: Boarding Party Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 2 + Special. You may attack up to 4 times with Boarding Party Special Attack. Roll one additional attack die when attacking a figure engaged with a Pirate or Captain you control. After each attack, if that was the first time you attacked the defending figure this turn, you may move one Pirate or Captain figure you control up to 4 spaces. You may not move the same figure more than once in a turn using Boarding Party Special Attack.

powers.name: Intimidate
powers.text: Small and Medium figures within 3 clear sight spaces of Bok-Bur-Na reduce their Defense Value by 1 when attacked by a Captain or Pirate you control.

powers.name: Swashbuckler
powers.text: After attacking with Bok-Bur-Na, you may attack an adjacent figure 1 additional time. Bok-Bur-Na's Attack Value is increased by 2 for the second attack.

powers.name: Utgar's Cutlass 14
powers.text: When Bok-Bur-Na destroys an adjacent figure with a normal attack, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 14 or higher, remove one Wound Marker from Bok-Bur-Na. Bok-Bur-Na cannot use Utgar's Cutlass on destructible objects.

powers.name: FIRST ASSAULT 2
powers.text: When Cornelius Breech, the Derelict Prince attacks, if the defending figure was not adjacent to him at the start of this turn, Cornelius adds 2 to his Attack Value during this attack.

powers.name: MUTINY
powers.text: After a Unique Captain you control receives a wound or is destroyed, any or all Pirate Squads you control that chose that Captain for The Captain's Way Special Power may choose Cornelius to be their chosen Captain for the rest of the game. If any Squads do, remove all Wound Markers from Cornelius Breech.

powers.name: CHARGE!!!
powers.text: If Dorim the Bulkhead Brawler attacks an opponent's figure during his turn, the Move Value of all of your Army Cards is increased by 1 until the next time you reveal an Order Marker.

powers.name: CHAIN AXE
powers.text: After rolling attack dice, before defense dice are rolled, you may re-roll one die that did not roll a skull.

powers.name: Command Familiar
powers.text: After revealing an Order Marker on Ewashia, Master of Tides, before taking Ewashia's turn, you may take a turn with a Small or Medium Beast you control.

powers.name: Twister Special Attack
powers.text: Range 6. Attack 4. Ewashia may use Twister Special Attack if she is within 1 space of a water tile. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose up to 2 spaces in a straight line from the targeted figure. All figures on those spaces are also affected by Twister Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Ewashia is not affected by Twister Special Attack.

powers.name: Aegis of the River
powers.text: Ewashia does not have to stop her movement when entering a water space. Add 1 to Ewashia's Defense Value while she is on a water space.

powers.name: Create Water
powers.text: Ewashia starts each game with 3 water tiles on this Army Card. At the end of Ewashia's turn, you may place a water tile from this Army Card on Ewashia's space or within 1 space of Ewashia, if the water tile fits normally onto that space.

powers.name: Black Powder Pistols
powers.text: Start the game with 3 black Powder Markers on this card. After moving and before attacking, you may remove a Powder Marker from this card to add 4 to the Exiles of the Sundered Sea's Range Value for the rest of the turn. You may only use this Special Power once during a round.

powers.name: Stealthy 13
powers.text: If an Exile of the Sundered Sea you control is attacked by an opponent's figure that is not adjacent and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-12, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 13 or higher, that Exile takes no damage and may immediately move up to 3 spaces.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Exiles of the Sundered Sea are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: BLACK POWDER PISTOL
powers.text: Start the game with 3 black Powder Markers on this card. After moving and before attacking, you may remove a Powder Marker from this card to add 4 to Fia Bonny the Void Siren's Range Value for the rest of the turn. You may only use this Special Power once during a round.

powers.name: MASTER OF DISGUISE 13
powers.text: The first time each turn that Fia Bonny is targeted by a Squad figure with a normal or special attack, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, Fia Bonny cannot be targeted by that attack or any other attack this turn.

powers.name: DISENGAGE
powers.text: Fia Bonny is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: RUN 3
powers.text: Before moving a Frostclaw Paladin, you may add 3 to that figure's Move Value this turn. If you do, subtract 2 from that figure's Attack Value this turn.

powers.name: JANDAR CHAMPION BONDING
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Frostclaw Paladins, you may take a turn with a Champion you control who follows Jandar.

powers.name: Hanwi's Darkness
powers.text: When you reveal an Order Marker, you may also reveal the "X" Order Marker on Glinerva the Kyrie Warrior to activate Hanwi's Darkness. Until you next reveal an Order Marker, Glinerva and all Small, Medium, and Large figures within 5 spaces of her cannot target or be targeted by non-adjacent figures with a normal or special attack.

powers.name: Concealment 17
powers.text: If Glinerva is targeted and receives one or more wounds from an attacking figure who is not adjacent, you must roll the 20-sided die. Count the minimum number of spaces between the attacker and Glinerva. Add this number to your die roll. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore any wounds Glinerva just received.

powers.name: Blast Furnace 15
powers.text: During Hellforge Mandukor's turn, before moving with it and each time it moves onto a space during this movement, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to Hellforge. If you roll a 15 or higher, that figure receives 1 wound. Figures with the Lava Resistant Special Power are not affected by Blast Furnace. Hellforge cannot roll for Blast Furnace against the same figure more than once per turn.

powers.name: Feed the Forge 15
powers.text: If a figure or destructible object adjacent to Hellforge is destroyed, you may roll the 20-sided die. Add 8 to the roll if the figure is an Eisenek, Soulborg, or destructible object. If you roll a 15 or higher, you may remove a Wound Marker from this card.

powers.name: Eisenek Advance
powers.text: At the start of each round after all Order Markers have been placed, if all your Order Markers are placed on Eisenek Army Cards, you may move Hellforge up to 4 spaces. Hellforge must end this movement on an empty space.

powers.name: Dismissive Strider
powers.text: Iron Lich Viscerot can move through Small and Medium figures, does not take leaving engagement attacks from Small and Medium figures, and can target and attack non-adjacent figures while only engaged with Small and Medium figures.

powers.name: Vile Injection
powers.text: Begin the game with 3 yellow Surge Markers on this Army Card. Once per turn, before moving another Eisennek figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Viscerot, you may remove a Surge Marker from this card to add 2 to that figure's Move and Attack Values until the end of the turn.

powers.name: Ironclad Puppeteer
powers.text: After revealing an Order Marker on Viscerot and taking a turn with Viscerot, you may take a turn with another Unique Eisennek Hero or Squad you control.

powers.name: Witchcraft Telekinesis
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may choose up to 2 different Small or Medium enemy figures within 5 clear sight spaces of Kilkorax the Kyrie Warrior. One at a time, roll the 20-sided die for each chosen figure. • If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll an 8 or higher, you may place the chosen figure onto a same-level space adjacent to Kilkorax. • If the chosen figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, you may place the chosen figure onto a same-level space adjacent to Kilkorax. Figures moved by Witchcraft Telekinesis never take leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Blunderbuss Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 3. All figures adjacent to the figure targeted by Blunderbuss Special Attack are also affected by Blunderbuss Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Killian Vane III cannot be affected by his own Blunderbuss Special Attack.

powers.name: Apparition
powers.text: Figures must be within two spaces of Kita the Springrunner to target her with a normal or special attack.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Kita can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: The Captain's Way
powers.text: At the start of the game, choose a Unique Captain you control to be the Knaves of the Silver Scimitar's Captain for this game. Knaves of the Silver Scimitar roll one additional defense die against attacks from non-adjacent figures when their chosen Captain is within 4 clear sight spaces.

powers.name: Captain's Orders
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Knaves of the Silver Scimitar, you may first take a turn with their chosen Captain or a Pirate Hero you control.

powers.name: First Assault 1
powers.text: When attacking with a Knave of the Silver Scimitar, if the defending figure was not adjacent to that Knave of the Silver Scimitar at the start of this turn, that Knave of the Silver Scimitar receives 1 additional attack die.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Knaves of the Silver Scimitar are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: RUN 3
powers.text: Before moving Knight Irene, you may add 3 to her Move Value this turn. If you do, subtract 2 from her Attack Value this turn.

powers.name: OVERWHELM SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3 + Special. You may attack twice with Overwhelm Special Attack. If you attack the same figure a second time, you may roll an additional attack die for the second attack. You may not use Overwhelm Special Attack if you used the Run Special Power this turn.

powers.name: Crushing Blow
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may inflict one wound on a Small or Medium Squad figure or a Small or Medium Common Hero adjacent to Knight Primus Adelbern.

powers.name: Brutality Aura
powers.text: When a Squad figure you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Loviatar the Kyrie Warrior attacks an adjacent figure with a normal attack, before defense dice are rolled, you may re-roll all attack dice that did not show skulls. Brutality Aura may only be used once per turn.

powers.name: Deadly Strike
powers.text: When attacking with Loviatar, all skulls rolled count for one additional hit.

powers.name: Dynastic Leadership
powers.text: If you control Loviatar and another Unique Kyrie Hero who follows Utgar, figures you control who follow Utgar increase their Move Value by 1.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: Once per turn, after attacking with Mielki the Kyrie Warrior, she may make one additional normal attack.

powers.name: Spear of Sankari
powers.text: When Mielki destroys a figure with a normal attack, you may choose a Small or Medium friendly figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Mielki. Remove a Wound Marker from the chosen figure. Mielki cannot heal herself with Spear of Sankari, and it cannot be used when destroying a destructible object.

powers.name: Life Drain
powers.text: Each time this figure destroys a figure, you may remove a Wound Marker from this Army Card. This figure cannot Life Drain destructible objects.

powers.name: Life Drain Spirit
powers.text: When Misaerx the Kyrie Warrior is destroyed, place this figure on the Army Card of a Unique Warrior Hero that follows Revna. That Hero now has Life Drain.

powers.name: Chain Grab 9
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with the Necrotech Wraithriders, one at a time, each Wraithrider may choose an enemy Small or Medium figure within 3 clear sight spaces whose level is no more than 11 levels above that Wraithrider's level or 6 levels below that Wraithrider's level. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 9 or higher, place the chosen figure on any empty same-level space adjacent to that Wraithrider. Figures moved by Chain Grab do not take leaving engagement attacks. A figure can only be moved by Chain Grab once each turn.

powers.name: Rolling Movement
powers.text: A Necrotech Wraithrider cannot move onto a space more than 2 levels above its level.

powers.name: Sonic Blast Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 2. You may attack one additional time with Sonic Blast Special Attack.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: Flying

powers.name: RELOAD
powers.text: If an Ordo Borealis does not move on its turn, it may add 6 to its Range Value for the rest of that turn.

powers.name: Heart Finder Spear 12
powers.text: Before attacking with Queen Qhyrion, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 12 or higher, a figure attacked by Queen Qhyrion may roll no more than 1 die for defense.

powers.name: Command Familiar
powers.text: After revealing an Order Marker on Raakchott, Steward of Death, before taking Raakchott's turn, you may take a turn with a Small or Medium Beast you control

powers.name: Consume the Dead
powers.text: Start the game with 3 red Consume Markers. When a figure within 3 clear sight spaces of Raakchott is destroyed, place a Consume Marker on this Army Card. You cannot place more than one Consume Marker on this card each turn.

powers.name: Soul Fury Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 2 + Special. All figures adjacent to Raakchott are affected by Soul Fury Special Attack. Add 1 to Raakchott's attack dice for each Consume Marker on this Army Card. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Do not place Consume Markers on this Army Card while using Soul Fury Special Attack. After using Soul Fury Special Attack, remove one Consume Marker from this Army Card for each figure you attacked this turn.

powers.name: Terrifying Aura
powers.text: While opponents' figures are within 4 clear sight spaces of Raelin the Kyrie Warrior, they lower their Defense Value by 1.

powers.name: Twist the Blade
powers.text: If Raelin inflicts at least 1 wound with a normal attack or leaving engagement attack, she inflicts 1 additional wound.

powers.name: Summon Vines
powers.text: Xenithrax starts the game with three Xenithrax Vines Glyphs on this Army Card. Once per round, after moving but before attacking, Xenithrax may choose an empty space within 4 spaces of Xenithrax and place a Xenithrax Vines Glyph from this Army Card onto that space.

powers.name: Erupting Earth Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5 + Special. Attack 4 - Special. The first target of Erupting Earth Special Attack must be within a range of 5. After attacking with Erupting Earth Special Attack, you may choose a figure that was adjacent to the defending figure at the beginning of that attack and attack that chosen figure with Erupting Earth Special Attack, rolling one fewer attack die. You may continue attacking with Erupting Earth Special Attack in this manner, rolling one fewer die than the previous attack, up to a total of four attacks. A figure cannot be attacked more than once in a turn with Erupting Earth Special Attack.

powers.name: Amulet of Paivatar
powers.text: When a Kyrie you control who follows Ullar within 6 clear sight spaces of Xiamara the Kyrie Warrior receives one or more wounds, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 8-16, ignore all but one wound just received. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore all wounds just received. Amulet of Paivatar does not affect Xiamara.

name: Dumutef Guard
set: The Road to the Forgotten Forest

powers.name: Road Strength
powers.text: Add 1 to Dumutef Guard's attack and defense while on a road space.

powers.name: Devourer Attack Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Devourers adjacent to a Dumutef Guard receive an additional attack die.

powers.name: Ghost Walk
powers.text: Agent Carr can move through all figures.

powers.name: Sword of Reckoning 4
powers.text: If Agent Carr is attacking an adjacent figure, add 4 dice to Agent Carr's attack.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Agent Carr is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Grenade Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Lob 12. Attack 2. Use this power once per game. Start the game with a grenade marker on this card. Remove the grenade marker to throw grenades. One at a time do the following with each Airborne Elite: Choose a figure to attack. No clear line of sight is needed. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Grenade Special Attack. Roll 2 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

powers.name: The Drop
powers.text: Airborne Elite do not start the game on the battlefield. At the start of each round, before you place Order Markers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher you may place all 4 Airborne Elite figures on any empty spaces. You cannot place them adjacent to each other or other figures, or on glyphs.

powers.name: Explosion Special Attack
powers.text: Range 7. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Explosion Special Attack. Deathwalker only needs a clear sight shot at the chosen figure. Roll 3 attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Deathwalker can be affected by his own Explosion Special Attack.

powers.name: Range Enhancement
powers.text: Any Soulborg Guards adjacent to Deathwalker add 2 spaces to their range.

powers.name: Attack Aura 1
powers.text: All friendly figures adjacent to Finn add 1 die to their normal attack.

powers.name: Warrior's Attack Spirit 1
powers.text: When Finn is destroyed, place this figure on any unique Army Card. Finn's Spirit adds 1 to the normal attack number on that card.

powers.name: Chomp
powers.text: Before attacking, choose one medium or small figure adjacent to Grimnak. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure, destroy it. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

powers.name: Orc Warrior Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Orc Warriors adjacent to Grimnak roll an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

powers.name: Stealth Dodge
powers.text: When a Krav Maga Agent rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one shield will block all damage.

powers.name: Water Clone
powers.text: Instead of attacking with all of the Marro Warriors, one at a time, roll the 20-sided die for each Marro Warrior in play. If you roll a 15 or higher, place a previously destroyed Marro Warrior on a same-level space adjacent to that Marro Warrior. Any Marro Warrior on a water space needs a 10 or higher to Water Clone. You may only Water Clone after you move.

powers.name: Fire Line Special Attack
powers.text: Range Special: Attack 4. Choose 8 spaces in a straight line from Mimring. All figures on those spaces who are in line of sight are affected by Mimring's Fire Line Special Attack. Roll 4 attack dice once for all affected figures. Affected figures roll defense dice separately

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Mimring's movement, ignore elevations. Mimring may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Mimring starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Mind Shackle 20
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any unique figure adjacent to Ne-gok-sa. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 20, take control of the chosen figure and that figure's Army Card. You now control that Army Card and all figures on it. Remove any Order Markers on this card. If Ne-Gok-Sa is destroyed, you retain control of any previously Mind Shackled Army Cards.

name: Raelin the Kyrie Warrior (Rise of the Valkyrie)

powers.name: DEFENSIVE AURA
powers.text: All figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Raelin add 2 to their defense dice. Raelin's Defensive Aura does not affect Raelin.

powers.name: FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for Raelin's movement, ignore elevations. Raelin may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Raelin starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

name: Sgt. Drake Alexander (Rise of the Valkyrie)

powers.name: Thorian Speed
powers.text: Opponents' figures must be adjacent to Sgt. Drake Alexander to attack him with a normal attack.

powers.name: Grapple Gun 25
powers.text: Instead of Sgt. Drake Alexander's normal move, he may move only one space. This space may be up to 25 levels higher. When using the Grapple Gun, all engagement rules still apply.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: When Syvarris attacks, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Berserker Charge
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, you may move all Tarn Viking Warriors again.

powers.name: Defensive Aura 1
powers.text: All friendly figures adjacent to Thorgrim add 1 die to their defense.

powers.name: Warrior's Armor Spirit 1
powers.text: When Thorgrim is destroyed, place this figure on any unique Army Card. Thorgrim's Spirit adds 1 to the defense number on that card.

powers.name: Zettian Targeting
powers.text: When attacking, if your second Zettian Guard attacks the same figure as the first Zettian Guard, add one attack die to the second Zettian Guard's attack.

powers.name: Machine Pistol Special Attack
powers.text: Range 7. Attack 2. Major Q10 may use this special attack 4 times in the same turn. Q10 may target the same figure or a different figure with each attack.

powers.name: Wrist Rocket Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 4. Major Q10 may use this special attack 2 times in the same turn. Q10 may target the same figure or a different figure with each attack.

powers.name: Hivelord Life Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Marrden Nagrubs, you may first take a turn with any Hivelord you control. Before moving the chosen Hivelord, you may destroy one adjacent Marrden Nagrub you control. If you destroy a Marrden Nagrub with Hivelord Life Bonding, remove 1 wound marker from the chosen Hivelord's Army Card.

powers.name: Climb X2
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Marrden Nagrubs may double their Height.

powers.name: Swamp Water Strength
powers.text: When a Marro Drudge is on a swamp water space, add 1 to its attack and defense.

powers.name: Swamp Water Tunnel
powers.text: If a Marro Drudge ends its normal movement on a swamp water space, you may immediately move it on any empty same-level swamp water space within 5 spaces. If a Marro Drudge is engaged when it starts to tunnel, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Hive Mind
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on this Army Card, you may take a turn with any small or medium common Marro Squad you control before taking a turn with Marro Hive. Any figure that is taking a turn must be within 12 clear sight spaces of Marro Hive prior to its movement.

powers.name: Marro Rebirth
powers.text: After taking a turn with Marro Hive, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, you may place any previously destroyed common Marro Squad figure from your army on an empty space adjacent to Marro Hive.

powers.name: Stinger Drain
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-4, you must destroy a Marro Stinger you control and you cannot attack this turn. If you roll a 5-9, add 0 to the attack value of this card. If you roll a 10 or higher, add 1 to the attack value of this card.

name: Raelin the Kyrie Warrior (Swarm of the Marro)

powers.name: Whirlwind Assault
powers.text: Raelin may attack any or all figures adjacent to her. Roll each attack separately.

powers.name: Extended Defensive Aura
powers.text: All figures you control within 6 clear sight spaces of Raelin add 1 to their defense dice. Raelin's Extended Defensive Aura does not affect Raelin.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Raelin's movement, ignore elevations. Raelin may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Raelin starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

name: Sgt. Drake Alexander (Swarm of the Marro)

powers.name: Thorian Speed
powers.text: Opponents' figures must be adjacent to Sgt. Drake Alexander to attack him with a normal attack.

powers.name: Grapple Arm
powers.text: Instead of his normal move, Sgt. Drake Alexander may use his Grapple Arm. Grapple Arm has a move of 4. When counting spaces for Grapple Arm, ignore elevations. Drake may grapple over water without stopping, over figures without becoming engaged, and over obstacles such as ruins. Drake may not grapple more than 45 levels up or down in a single Grapple Arm move. If Drake is engaged when he starts his Grapple Arm move, he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Pistol Fire Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 3. Drake may not use Pistol Fire Special Attack to attack a figure who follows Jandar.

powers.name: Concentrated Will
powers.text: If Shiori has only one unrevealed order marker on her Army Card, add 1 to her attack and defense.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Shiori can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Shuriken Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack Special. If Shiori is attacking a small or medium figure, roll 3 attack dice for Shuriken Special Attack. If Shiori is attacking a figure of a different size or a destructible object, roll 2 attack dice for Shuriken Special Attack.

powers.name: Dragon Healing
powers.text: Before moving, you may choose a wounded Hero figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, remove one wound marker from the chosen Hero's Army Card. Sonlen's Dragon can use its Dragon Healing on Sonlen.

powers.name: Dragon Swoop
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sonlen. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the chosen figure receives one wound.

powers.name: Trample Stomp
powers.text: At any point while moving, Tor-Kul-Na may choose a small or medium figure that is adjacent, on the same level, and on a space where Tor-Kul-Na may end his movement. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-7, the figure is safe and Tor-Kul-Na's movement ends. If you roll 8-20, the chosen figure receives one wound. If the wound destroys the figure, move Tor-Kul-Na onto the space that figure occupied, and you may continue Tor-Kul-Na's movement. If the chosen figure is not destroyed, Tor-Kul-Na's movement ends. Tor-Kul-Na must be on a space where he can end movement each time he uses this power.

powers.name: Glacier Traverse
powers.text: If a Dzu-Teh is adjacent to a Glacier Mountain, the Dzu-Teh may Glacier Traverse instead of moving normally. You may do this with any or all Dzu-Teh you control each turn. To Glacier Traverse, move to any unoccupied space adjacent to that Glacier Mountain.

powers.name: Glacier Camouflage
powers.text: If a Dzu-Teh is adjacent to a Glacier Mountain, opponents' figures must be adjacent to that Dzu-Teh to attack it with a normal attack.

powers.name: Snow and Ice Enhanced Movement
powers.text: Slippery Ice and Heavy Snow only count as 1 space when moving.

powers.name: Climb X3
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Fyorlag Spiders may triple their height.

powers.name: Entangling Web
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any one small or medium opponent's figure that is engaged with at least three Fyorlag Spiders that you control. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, remove one unrevealed order marker at random from the chosen figure's Army Card (or cards if your opponent has more than one Common Army Card for that figure).

powers.name: Predator Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Fyorlag Spiders, you may first take a turn with any Predator you control.

powers.name: Lava Resistant
powers.text: Obsidian Guards never roll for molten lava damage or lava field damage and they do not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

powers.name: Lava Throw
powers.text: When an Obsidian Guard is on a molten lava space it may add 2 to its range.

powers.name: Water Weakness
powers.text: An Obsidian Guard on a water space rolls 2 fewer defense dice.

powers.name: Beast Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Arrow Gruts, you may first take a turn with any Beast you control.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Arrow Gruts are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Orc Champion Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Blade Gruts, you may first take a turn with any Orc Champion you control.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Blade Gruts are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Healing Touch
powers.text:
After moving and before attacking, choose a wounded hero figure adjacent to Kelda. Then roll the 20-sided die to add or remove wound markers from the chosen figure's card.
• If you roll 1, add 2 markers.
• If you roll 2-5, remove 1 marker.
• If you roll 6-17, remove up to 2 markers.
• If you roll 18-20, remove all markers.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Kelda's movement, ignore elevations. Kelda may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Kelda starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Soldier Leadership
powers.text: All Soldiers you control move one additional space.

powers.name: Soldier Attack Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Soldiers adjacent to Marcus Decimus Gallus receive an additional attack die.

powers.name: Deadly Shot
powers.text: When attacking with Omnicron Snipers, all skulls rolled count for one additional hit.

powers.name: Arrow Volley
powers.text: Special Attack- Range 6, Attack 6. Three unengaged adjacent Roman Archers on the same level may combine their attacks and roll their attack dice as one attack. All Roman Archers in the arrow volley must have a clear line of sight on the one target

powers.name: Warlord Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Roman Legionnaires, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control.

powers.name: Shield Wall
powers.text: When defending with a Roman Legionnaire, add 1 defense die for each other adjacent Roman Legionnaire up to a maximum of +2 dice, for the Shield Wall power.

powers.name: Attack Aura
powers.text: All figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Taelord get +1 to attack. Taelord's Attack Aura does not effect Taelord.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Taelord's movement, ignore elevations. Taelord may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Tornak is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Orc Warrior Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Orc Warriors adjacent to Tornak receive an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

powers.name: Slither
powers.text: Venoc Vipers do not have to stop their movement when entering water spaces.

powers.name: Frenzy
powers.text: After you take a turn with Venoc Vipers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher you may take another turn with Venoc Vipers.

powers.name: Scout Leadership
powers.text: All scouts you control can move an additional 2 spaces.

powers.name: Frenzy Enhancement
powers.text: Add 1 to your die roll when you roll for the Frenzy power on any Army Card.

powers.name: Slither
powers.text: Venoc Warlord does not have to stop his movement when entering water spaces.

powers.name: WAIT THEN FIRE
powers.text: If none of the 4th Massachusetts Line move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

powers.name: VALIANT ARMY DEFENSE BONUS
powers.text: If every Army Card you control has a valiant personality, each soldier in the 4th Massachusetts Line receives 1 additional defense die.

powers.name: Unleashed Fury
powers.text: Before moving, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1, choose an Anubian Wolf you control and destroy it. If you roll a 2-6, add 1 to the attack value of this card. If you roll a 7-11, add 2 to the attack value of this card. If you roll a 12-15, add 3 to the attack value of this card. If you roll a 16-19, add 4 to the attack value of this card. If you roll a 20, add 8 to the attack value of this card.

powers.name: Relentless Assault
powers.text: Each friendly figure adjacent to Khosumet with a relentless personality receives an additional attack die.

powers.name: Unleashed Fury Enhancement
powers.text: You may add 1 to your die roll when you roll for the Unleashed Fury power on any Army Card.

powers.name: Human Champion Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Knights of Weston, you may first take a turn with any Human Champion you control.

powers.name: A Coward's Reward
powers.text: Knights of Weston roll one additional die against figures leaving an engagement with them.

powers.name: Wounded Smash
powers.text: When Krug attacks, he receives one extra attack die for each wound marker he has.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: When Krug attacks, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Hive Swarm
powers.text: Before moving Marro Drones, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 1-12, you may move and attack with up to 3 Marro Drones you control. If you roll 13-16, you may move and attack with up to 6 Marro Drones you control. If you roll 17-20, you may move and attack with up to 9 Marro Drones you control.

powers.name: Paralyzing Stare 16
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, choose any small or medium figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Me-Burq-Sa. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 16 or higher, the chosen figure cannot roll any defense dice if attacked by Me-Burq-Sa this turn.

powers.name: Utgar's Orders
powers.text: Instead of taking a turn with the Minions of Utgar, you may take a turn with any Kyrie Warrior you control who follows Utgar

powers.name: Deadly Strike
powers.text: When attacking with Minions of Utgar all skulls rolled count for one additional hit

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Minions of Utgar's movement, ignore elevation. Minions of Utgar may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Minion of Utgar starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: A Coward's Reward
powers.text: Sir Denrick rolls one additional die against each figure leaving an engagement with him.

powers.name: Giant Killer
powers.text: When Sir Denrick attacks huge figures, add 2 attack dice.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Swog Rider is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Orc Archer Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Orc Archers adjacent to a Swog Rider receive an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

powers.name: Overextend Attack
powers.text: After taking a turn with Alastair MacDirk, you may place a wound marker on Alastair MacDirk and take another turn with him. You may only use this power once during a round.

powers.name: Knight and Sentinel Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Knights and Sentinels adjacent to Concan roll an additional attack die and an additional defense die.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Concan's movement, ignore elevations. Concan may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Concan starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Self-Destruct
powers.text: After moving and instead of attacking, Deathwalker may choose to self-destruct. Roll the 20-sided die to determine if any other figures are wounded. If you roll a 1-3, all adjacent figures are safe. If you roll a 4-15, each adjacent figure receives 2 wounds. If you roll a 16-19, each adjacent figure receives 4 wounds. If you roll a 20, each adjacent figure receives 8 wounds. After using this power, Deathwalker is always destroyed.

powers.name: Stealth Dodge
powers.text: When Deathwalker 7000 rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one shield will block all damage.

powers.name: TOUGH
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack, Gorillinators always add one automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

powers.name: Shotgun Blast Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Shotgun Blast Special Attack. Johnny only needs a clear sight shot at the chosen figure. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Johnny cannot be affected by his own Shotgun Blast Special Attack.

powers.name: Highland Fury
powers.text: At the start of the game, choose a Human Champion you control. While that champion is in play, MacDirk Warriors roll one additional attack die for each wound marker on the chosen hero. There can be only one Human Champion for all the MacDirk Warriors you control. MacDirk Warriors cannot attack their chosen Human Champion.

powers.name: Human Champion Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the MacDirk Warriors, you may first take a turn with any Human Champion you control.

powers.name: Wild Pack Movement
powers.text: Before moving, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-3, add 1 to the move value of this card. If you roll a 4-6, add 3 to the move value of this card. If you roll a 7-20, add 7 to the move value of this card.

powers.name: Marro Plague
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to any Marrden Hounds you control. If you roll a 16 or higher, that figure receives a wound. Soulborgs and Wulsinu are not affected by this marro plague.

powers.name: Stealth Armor 15
powers.text: When a Microcorp Agent receives one or more wounds, before removing that agent, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, ignore any wounds.

powers.name: Water Suits
powers.text: Microcorp Agents do not have to stop their movement when entering a water space. Add 2 to a Microcorp Agent's defense while he is on a water space.

powers.name: Sighting
powers.text: When a Microcorp Agent is attacking with a height advantage, he rolls an additional attack die.

powers.name: Spear of Summoning
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, choose any figure you control on the battlefield, then roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-8, nothing happens. If you roll a 9-20, move the chosen figure to any space adjacent to Saylind. If the summoned figure is engaged, the figure does not receive leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Saylind's movement, ignore elevations. Saylind may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Saylind starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Shields of Valor
powers.text: When defending with Sentinels of Jandar, each shield rolled counts for one additional block.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Sentinels of Jandar's movement, ignore elevations. Sentinels of Jandar may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Sentinel of Jandar starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Shaolin Assault
powers.text: A Shaolin Monk may attack any or all figures adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

powers.name: Stealth Leap
powers.text: Instead of their normal move, any or all Shaolin Monks may Stealth Leap. Stealth Leap has a move of 3. When counting spaces for a Monk's leaping movement, ignore elevations. A Monk may leap over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. A Monk may not leap more than 12 levels up or down in a single leap. If a monk is engaged when he starts to leap, he does not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Ullar Warlord Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Armoc Vipers, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control who follows Ullar.

powers.name: Slither
powers.text: Armoc Vipers do not have to stop their movement when entering water spaces.

powers.name: Frenzy
powers.text: After you take a turn with Aubrien Archers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may take another turn with Aubrien Archers.

powers.name: ULLAR ENHANCED RIFLE SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 10. Attack 1. Choose a non-adjacent small or medium figure to attack. The chosen figure cannot roll defense dice when attacked by Deadeye Dan's Ullar Enhanced Rifle Special Attack. Deadeye Dan may not use this special attack if he moved this turn.

powers.name: SHARPSHOOTER
powers.text: Instead of attacking, you may choose any non-adjacent figure within 10 clear sight spaces of Deadeye Dan. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 19 or 20, the chosen figure is destroyed. If you roll a 1-18, you missed. Deadeye Dan may not use this special power if he moved this turn.

powers.name: Cyberclaw
powers.text: All small or medium opponent's figures that enter or occupy a space adjacent to any Gladiatron may not move. Figures affected by the Cyberclaw cannot be moved by any special power on an Army Card or Glyph.

powers.name: Melee Defense 1
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, a Gladiatron adds 1 die.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: When Guilty McCreech attacks, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Shotgun Blast Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 3. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Shotgun Blast Special Attack. James only needs a clear shot at the chosen figure. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. James cannot be affected by his own Shotgun Blast Special Attack.

powers.name: Whip 12
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, choose a small or medium figure adjacent to James. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 12 or higher, the chosen figure cannot roll any defense dice if attacked by James this turn.

powers.name: Improved Cyberclaw
powers.text: All small, medium or large opponent's figures that enter or occupy a space adjacent to Major X17 may not move. Figures affected by the Cyberclaw cannot be moved by any special power on an Army Card or glyph.

powers.name: Melee Defense 4
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, Major X17 adds 4 dice.

powers.name: Rod of Negation
powers.text: Start the game with 3 brown Negation Markers on this card. At the end of the turn, if you have at least 1 Negation Marker on this card, you may choose any opponent's unique figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Morsbane. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-15, nothing happens. If you roll a 16-19, place a Negation Marker on the chosen figure's Army Card. All of that figure's special powers are negated for the entire game. If you roll a 20, destroy the chosen figure.

powers.name: Disciplined Influence
powers.text: At the start of the game, you may choose any unique Army Card you control. For this game the chosen card's personality is disciplined, regardless of what is listed on the card.

powers.name: Sacred Band
powers.text: When an adjacent Sacred Band figure receives one or more wounds, roll the 20-sided die before removing that figure. If you roll a 15 or higher, ignore any wounds.

powers.name: Einar Warlord Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Sacred Band, you may first take a turn with any Warlord you control who follows Einar.

powers.name: Disciplined Army Defense Bonus
powers.text: If every Army Card you control has a disciplined personality, each soldier in the Sacred Band receives 1 additional defense die.

powers.name: Stare of Stone
powers.text: Instead of attacking, choose any figure within 4 clear sight spaces of Sudema. Roll the 20-sided die. If the chosen figure is a Squad figure and you roll a 7 or higher, destoy it. If the chosen figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 17 or higher, destroy the chosen Hero.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

powers.name: Bloodlust
powers.text: For every opponent's figure a Tagawa Samurai destroys, place a purple Experience Marker on this card. When attacking with Tagawa Samurai, roll one additional attack die for each Experience Marker on this card. A maximum of 3 Experience Markers can be placed on this card.

powers.name: First Assault 3
powers.text: When attacking with Valguard, if the defending figure was not adjacent to Valguard at the start of this turn, Valguard receives 3 additional attack dice.

powers.name: Berserker Charge Enhancement
powers.text: Add 1 to your die roll when you roll for the Berserker Charge power on any Army Card.

powers.name: Gladiatron Movement Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Blastatrons, you may move 4 Gladiatrons you control up to 5 spaces each.

powers.name: Homing Device
powers.text: When attacking a non-adjacent figure, add 1 attack die for every Soulborg who follows Vydar that is adjacent to the defending figure.

powers.name: One Shield Defense
powers.text: When rolling defense dice, if Crixus rolls at least one shield, the most wounds Crixus may take for this attack is one.

powers.name: Scatter
powers.text: After a Deathreaver you control rolls defense dice against a normal attack, you may move any 2 Deathreavers you control up to 4 spaces each.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Deathreavers are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Climb X2
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Deathreavers may double their Height.

powers.name: Maul
powers.text: When rolling attack dice against a small or medium figure, if a Deathstalker rolls a skull on every die, the defending figure receives a wound for every skull, and cannot roll any defense dice.

powers.name: Charging Assault
powers.text: Any or all Kozuke Samurai may add 3 to their Move number as long as they are unengaged prior to moving. Kozuke Samurai must be able to move adjacent to an opponent's figure in order to use Charging Assault.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

powers.name: SMOKE POWDER 13
powers.text: When any Nakita Agent you control, or any figure you control that is adjacent to any Nakita Agent you control, is targeted for a normal attack from a non-adjacent opponent, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, all Nakita Agents you control, and all figures you control that are adjacent to those Nakita Agents, no longer have any visible hit zones for the duration of the targeting figure's turn.

powers.name: ENGAGEMENT STRIKE 15
powers.text: If an opponent's small or medium figure moves adjacent to a Nakita Agent, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the opponent's figure receives a wound. Figures may be targeted only as they move into engagement with a Nakita Agent.

powers.name: GORILLINATOR MOVEMENT BONDING
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Nakita Agents, you may move 3 Gorillinators you control up to 7 spaces each.

powers.name: Disappearing Ninja
powers.text: If a Ninja of the Northern Wind is attacked with a normal attack and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die to disappear. If you roll 1-11, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 12 or higher, that Ninja of the Northern Wind takes no damage and instead may move up to 4 spaces. Ninjas of the Northern Wind can disappear only if they end their disappearing move not adjacent to any enemy figures.

powers.name: Ghost Walk
powers.text: Ninjas of the Northern Wind can move through all figures.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Ninjas of the Northern Wind are never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Net Trip 14
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, any small or medium figure attacked by Retiarius this turn may roll no more than 1 die for defense.

powers.name: Gladiator Inspiration
powers.text: If all Order Markers for a round are placed on Gladiator Army Cards, and at least one Order Marker is placed on Spartacus, then all Gladiators you control (except Spartacus) become inspired. Inspired Gladiators add one to their Move number and add 1 extra attack die and defense die for the rest of the round.

powers.name: Defensive Agility
powers.text: When a Warrior of Ashra rolls defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, one shield will block all damage.

powers.name: Overextend Attack
powers.text: After taking a turn with Eldgrim, you may place a wound marker on Eldgrim and take another turn with him. You may use this power only once during a round.

powers.name: Warrior's Swiftness Spirit
powers.text: When Eldgrim is destroyed, you may place this figure on any unique Army Card. Eldgrim's Spirit adds 1 to the move number on that card.

powers.name: Gift of the Empress Aura
powers.text: When you roll defense dice for any Kyrie that you control who follows Einar and is within 5 clear sight spaces of Empress Kiova, you may re-roll all defense dice that did not show shields. Gift of the Empress Aura can be used only once for each defense roll. Empress Kiova's Gift of the Empress Aura does not affect Empress Kiova.

powers.name: Stealth Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Empress Kiova's movement, ignore elevations. Empress Kiova may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Empress Kiova starts to fly, if she is engaged she will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Orc Champion Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Heavy Gruts, you may first take a turn with any Orc Champion you control.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Heavy Gruts are never attacked when leaving engagements.

powers.name: Quick Release Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Attack 4. When Kaemon Awa attacks with his Quick Release Special Attack, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

powers.name: Mind Shackle 19
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may choose any unique figure adjacent to Kee-Mo-Shi. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll 19 or 20, take control of the chosen figure and that figure's Army Card. You now control that Army Card and all figures on it. Remove any Order Markers on the chosen figure's Army Card. If Kee-Mo-Shi is destroyed, you retain control of any previously Mind Shackled Army Cards.

powers.name: Toxic Skin
powers.text: After attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to Kee-Mo-Shi. If you roll a 17 or higher, that figure receives one wound. Soulborgs are not affected by Toxic Skin.

powers.name: Helm of Mitonsoul Aura
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, Runa may use her Helm of Mitonsoul Aura. When using the Helm of Mitonsoul Aura, you must roll the 20-sided die for all figures within 3 clear sight spaces of Runa, one at a time. If you roll a 20, destroy the figure. Runa's Helm of Mitonsoul Aura does not affect Runa.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Runa's movement, ignore elevations. Runa may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Runa starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Soul Devour
powers.text: Before moving, each Shade of Bleakwoode you control may choose an adjacent unique hero. Roll the 20-sided die once for each Shade. If you roll 19 or 20, destroy the Shade of Bleakwoode figure, then take control of the chosen unique hero and remove any Order Markers on its card. You now control that Army Card.

powers.name: Stealth Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Shades of Bleakwoode's movement, ignore elevations. Shades of Bleakwoode may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Shade of Bleakwoode starts to fly, if it is engaged it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Counter Strike
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure. This power does not work against other Samurai.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: When each member of the Einar Imperium attacks, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Stealth Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for the Einar Imperium's movement, ignore elevations. The Einar Imperium may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a member of the Einar Imperium starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Horde Movement
powers.text: You may move up to 6 Zombies of Morindan that you control each turn. However, you may attack with only 3 Zombies of Morindan. You may attack with any 3 Zombies of Morindan, even Zombies of Morindan that you did not move this turn.

powers.name: Zombie Onslaught Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1, Attack 6. Three Zombies of Morindan on the same level may combine their attacks and roll their attack dice as one attack. All Zombies of Morindan in the attack must be engaged to the targeted figure.

powers.name: Zombies Rise Again
powers.text: If a Zombie of Morindan that you control destroys an opponent's small or medium figure, replace that figure immediately, if possible, with one of your own previously destroyed Zombies of Morindan. Newly placed Zombies of Morindan cannot attack this turn. Undead are not affected by Zombies Rise Again.
