powers.name: Wait Then Fire
powers.text: If none of the Ashigaru Harquebus move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

powers.name: Encircle Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1, Attack 6. If 3 Ashigaru Yari you control are adjacent to the same enemy figure, they may roll their attack dice as one combined attack. The defending figure compares height to the lowest Ashigaru Yari to determine any height advantage. If Encircle Special Attack is used, the 4th figure that moved this turn cannot attack.

powers.name: Life Drain
powers.text: Each time Cyprien Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Cyprien Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructible objects.

powers.name: Chilling Touch
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, Cyprien Esenwein may attempt a Chilling Touch. To do this, choose a figure adjacent to Cyprien Esenwein and roll the 20-sided die. • If you roll 1-12, nothing happens. • If you roll 13-15, the chosen figure receives 1 wound. • If you roll 16-17, the chosen figure receives 2 wounds. • If you roll 18-19, the chosen figure receives 3 wounds. • If you roll a 20 or higher, the chosen figure receives 6 wounds. Cyprien Esenwein's Chilling Touch does not affect Soulborgs or destructible objects.

powers.name: Stealth Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Cyprien Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Cyprien Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Cyprien Esenwein starts to fly, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Vanish 9
powers.text: If Isamu is attacked and at least 1 skull is rolled, roll the 20-sided die to vanish. If you roll 1-8, roll defense dice normally. If you roll a 9 or higher, Isamu takes no damage and may immediately move up to 4 spaces. Isamu can vanish only if he ends his vanishing move not adjacent to any enemy figures.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Isamu can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Dishonorable Attack
powers.text: When attacking a figure who follows Jandar, Isamu rolls 2 additional attack dice.

powers.name: Life Drain
powers.text: Each time Iskra Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Iskra Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructible objects.

powers.name: Summon the Rechets of Bogdan
powers.text: After taking a turn with Iskra Esenwein, you may attempt to summon the Rechets of Bogdan if they are in your army and they have not yet been successfully summoned. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you must place all 3 Rechets of Bogdan on empty spaces within 6 clear sight spaces of Iskra Esenwein. Any Rechets of Bogdan that you cannot place on the battlefield are immediately destroyed and cannot be summoned again. When the Rechets of Bogdan are summoned, you may immediately take a turn with them.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Iskra Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Iskra Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Iskra Esenwein starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Strength of Oak Aura 1
powers.text: All friendly Elves adjacent to Kyntela Gwyn add 1 to their defense dice.

powers.name: Life Drain
powers.text: Each time Marcu Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Marcu Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructible objects.

powers.name: Eternal Hatred
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on this card, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 17 or higher, choose an opponent. That opponent will now control Marcu Esenwein for the remainder of your turn, but will not be able to view any unrevealed order markers on his card. At the end of that turn, control of Marcu returns to you. All order markers and figures that were on Marcu's Army Card will stay on his Army Card.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Marcu Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Marcu Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Marcu Esenwein starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Iskra's Summoning
powers.text: Rechets of Bogdan do not start the game on the battlefield. They must be summoned onto the battlefield by Iskra Esenwein.

powers.name: Lethal Sting
powers.text: When rolling attack dice against a small or medium figure, if a Rechet of Bogdan rolls a skull on every die, the defending figure cannot roll any defense dice and is immediately destroyed.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Rechets of Bogdan's movement, ignore elevations. Rechets of Bogdan may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Rechet of Bogdan starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Life Drain
powers.text: Each time Sonya Esenwein destroys a figure, you may remove a wound marker from this Army Card. Sonya Esenwein cannot Life Drain destructible objects.

powers.name: Eternal Strength
powers.text: Anytime you roll the 20-sided die for Cyprien Esenwein's Chilling Touch, you may add 2 to your die roll.

powers.name: Eternal Heartbreak
powers.text: If you control Cyprien Esenwein and he is destroyed, Sonya Esenwein immediately receives 2 wounds.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Sonya Esenwein's movement, ignore elevations. Sonya Esenwein may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Sonya Esenwein starts to fly, if she is engaged she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Galloping Charge
powers.text: A Templar Cavalry Knight receives 2 additional attack dice when attacking any figure that was at least 4 clear sight spaces away from that Knight at the start of his turn.

powers.name: Dismiss the Rabble
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against adjacent attacking small or medium Squad figures, Templar Cavalry Knights receive 1 additional defense die.

powers.name: Righteous Smite
powers.text: When attacking an opponent's figure who follows Utgar, Templar Cavalry Knights receive 1 additional attack die.

powers.name: Evisceraxe Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1, Attack 5. The Evisceraxe Special Attack cannot be used on small figures.

powers.name: Guard Leadership
powers.text: All Guards you control move one additional space.

powers.name: Wait Then Fire
powers.text: If none of the 10th Regiment of Foot move this turn, add 1 die to their attack.

powers.name: Melee Defense 1
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack from an adjacent figure, a Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot adds 1 to his defense dice.

powers.name: Bayonet Attack 1
powers.text: When rolling attack dice against an adjacent figure, a Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot adds 1 to his attack dice. A Soldier in the 10th Regiment of Foot can only use Bayonet Attack if he moved at least one space this turn.

powers.name: Staff of Lerkintin
powers.text: When defending with Arkmer, add as many defense dice as the number of Elves you control adjacent to Arkmer.

powers.name: Engagement Strike 13
powers.text: If an opponent's small or medium figure moves adjacent to Arkmer, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher, the opponent's figure receives one wound. Figures may be targeted only as they move into engagement with Arkmer.

powers.name: Fire Strike Special Attack
powers.text: Range 6 Attack 2 + Special. When Chardris attacks with Fire Strike Special Attack, add 1 to Chardris' attack dice for every additional Elf Wizard you control within 3 clear sight spaces of Chardris, up to a minimum of + 3 dice.

powers.name: ELVEN SUMMONING SPELL
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may roll the 20-sided die. Add the number of Elves you control adjacent to Emirroon to your die roll. • If you roll 1-4, nothing happens. • If you roll 5-11, you may place 1 Elf you control adjacent to Emirroon. • If you roll 12-17, you may place up to 2 Elves you control adjacent to Emirroon. • If you roll 18-20, you may place up to 3 Elves you control adjacent to Emirroon. If the summoned Elves are engaged, they will not take any leaving engagement attacks. Emirroon cannot summon an Elf that he is already adjacent to.

powers.name: Marro Warlord Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Grok Riders, you may first take a turn with any Marro Warlord you control.

powers.name: Mark of the Warlord
powers.text: When attacking a figure that is adjacent to any Marro Warlord you control, Grok Riders add 2 to their attack dice.

powers.name: Grok Training
powers.text: Marro Hive cannot rebirth Grok Riders with its Marro Rebirth special power.

powers.name: Rain of Flame Special Attack
powers.text: Range 7. Attack 1 + Special. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to the chosen figure are also affected by the Rain of Flame Special Attack. Add 1 to Jorhdawn's attack once for every additional Elf Wizard you control within 3 clear sight spaces of Jorhdawn, up to a maximum of + 3 dice. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each affected figure rolls defense dice separately. Jorhdawn cannot be affected by her own Rain of Flame Special Attack.

powers.name: Kato Katsuro's Command
powers.text: Instead of taking a turn with Kato Katsuro, you may take a turn with one of the following that you control: • 1 Samurai Hero, or • 1 Samurai Squad, or • 1 Ashigaru Harquebus Squad and/or 1 Ashigaru Yari Squad. You may choose which Squad to activate first. Any figure in the above list that is taking a turn instead of Kato Katsuro must be within clear sight of Kato Katsuro before moving.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Moriko can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Saber Storm Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 1, 2 or 3. Moriko starts each turn with 6 attack dice. Choose any adjacent figure and attack by rolling 1, 2 or 3 attack dice. Moriko may keep making special attacks with 1, 2 or 3 attack dice until she has rolled all 6 attack dice. Moriko may target the same or different figures with each attack.

powers.name: Tricky Speed 4
powers.text: If Otonashi starts her turn adjacent to any figure you control who has a tricky personality, she may move 4 additional spaces.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Otonashi can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Attack the Wild 2
powers.text: When attacking a figure who has a wild personality, Otonashi rolls 2 additional attack dice.

powers.name: Knight's Courage
powers.text: Add 1 to Sir Dupuis' attack dice for every Knight you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Sir Dupuis up to a maximum of +3 dice.

powers.name: Tactical Disengagement 7
powers.text: When Sir Dupuis receives one or more wounds from a leaving engagement attack, immediately roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 7 or higher, ignore any wounds from that leaving engagement attack.

powers.name: Chalice of Fortitude
powers.text: If Sir Dupuis has 4 or more wounds on his Army Card, add 1 to his defense dice.

powers.name: Mind Link
powers.text: Instead of taking a turn with Ulginesh, you may take a turn with up to 2 different Elf Wizards you control. Ulginesh cannot be one of the 2 Elf Wizards. Any Elf Wizard that is taking a turn instead of Ulginesh must be within 6 clear sight spaces of Ulginesh before moving.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Ulginesh's movement, ignore elevations. Ulginesh may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Ulginesh starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Darklord Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with Wolves of Badru, you may first take a turn with any Darklord you control.

powers.name: Climb 2X
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Wolves of Badru may double their height.

powers.name: Pounce Special Attack
powers.text: Range 3. Attack 5. A Wolf of Badru that moved but did not attack normally may use Pounce Special Attack. To pounce, choose a non-adjacent small or medium figure whose base is not higher or lower than 5 levels from the base of the attacking Wolf. If the figure is destroyed, immediately place the attacking Wolf on the space the figure occupied. If the figure is not destroyed, destroy the attacking Wolf.

powers.name: Mind Blast Special Attack
powers.text: Range 3. Attack 3. Tul-Bak-Ra does not need clear line of sight to attack with Mind Blast Special Attack.

powers.name: Teleportation
powers.text: Instead of moving Tul-Bak-Ra normally, you may choose any empty space that is on the same level and within 10 spaces of Tul-Bak-Ra. Place Tul-Bak-Ra on the chosen space. When Tul-Bak-Ra starts to Teleport, if he is engaged he will not take any leaving engagement attacks

powers.name: Teleport Reinforcements
powers.text: When Tul-Bak-Ra receives one or more wounds from an opposing figure's Normal or Special Attack but is not destroyed, you may choose one friendly Marro Squad figure for every wound Tul-Bak-Ra just received. Place the chosen figure(s) on any empty space(s) adjacent to Tul-Bak-Ra. If the teleported figure(s) are engaged, they will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Kyrie Leadership
powers.text: All Kyrie you control, except Atlaga, move one additional space.

powers.name: Ullar's Bolt of the Witherwood
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with Atlaga, you may choose any opponent's figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Atlaga. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-15, nothing happens. If you roll a 16 or higher, the chosen figure is destroyed. Atlaga may attempt to use this power only once per game.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for Atlaga's movement, ignore elevations. Atlaga may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When Atlaga starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Tracking
powers.text: While moving, Brave Arrow may add 2 to his move number. If he does, he cannot attack this turn.

powers.name: Scout Melee Attack Enhancement
powers.text: All friendly Scouts adjacent to Brave Arrow receive an additional attack die when attacking a figure adjacent to them.

powers.name: Concealment 10
powers.text: If Brave Arrow is targeted and receives one or more wounds from an attacking figure who is not adjacent, you must roll the 20-sided die. Count the minimum number of spaces between the attacker and Brave Arrow. Add this number to your die roll. If you roll a 10 or higher, ignore any wounds Brave Arrow just received.

powers.name: Human Gladiator Hero Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Capuan Gladiators, you may first take a turn with any Human Gladiator Hero you control.

powers.name: Initiative Advantage
powers.text: If all of your order markers are on Gladiator Army Cards, you may add 1 to your initiative roll for every order marker on the Capuan Gladiators' Army Card, up to a maximum of +3 for Initiative Advantage.

powers.name: Ninjutsu Barrage Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3. Instead of moving and attacking normally with Kumiko, you may move Kumiko up to 3 spaces. Kumiko can attack up to 3 times with Ninjutsu Barrage Special Attack at any point before, during, or after this move as long as Kumiko is on a space where she could end her movement. Kumiko cannot attack the same figure more than once on a single turn.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Kumiko can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Cell Divide
powers.text: When a Marro Divider you control receives one or more wounds from a Normal or Special Attack by an opponent's figure, you may roll the 20-sided die before removing that figure. If you roll a 17 or higher, ignore any wounds that figure just received and, if possible, place one of your previously destroyed Marro Dividers on a same-level space adjacent to the defending Marro Divider.

powers.name: Self-Replicating
powers.text: Marro Hive cannot rebirth Marro Dividers with its Marro Rebirth special power.

powers.name: Deadly Strike
powers.text: When attacking with Migol Ironwill, each skull rolled counts as one additional hit.

powers.name: One Shield Defense
powers.text: When rolling defense dice, if Migol Ironwill rolls at least one shield, the most wounds Migol Ironwill can take for this attack is one.

powers.name: Climb X2
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Migol Ironwill may double his Height.

powers.name: Battle Fury
powers.text: If a Mohican River Tribesman is engaged, add 1 to his attack dice and 2 to his defense dice.

powers.name: War Cry
powers.text: After taking a turn with the Mohican River Tribe, if at least two Mohican River Tribesmen you control are engaged, you may immediately take a turn with one Unique Tribesman Hero you control.

powers.name: Concealment 19
powers.text: If a Mohican River Tribesman you control is targeted and receives one or more wounds from an attacking figure who is not adjacent, you must roll the 20-sided die. Count the minimum number of spaces between the attacker and the Mohican River Tribesman. Add this number to your die roll. If you roll a 19 or higher, ignore any wounds the Mohican River Tribesman just received.

powers.name: Circuitry Overload
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each Soulborg figure adjacent to any Omnicron Repulsors you control. If the figure is a Squad figure and you roll a 13 or higher, destroy that figure. If the figure is a Hero figure and you roll a 16 or higher, that figure receives a wound. Omnicron Repulsors are not affected by Circuitry Overload.

powers.name: Targeting Beacon
powers.text: When attacking a non-adjacent figure, all Soulborg figures you control who follow Jandar add 1 die to their attack if at least one Omnicron Repulsor you control is adjacent to the defending figure.

powers.name: EMP Response
powers.text: If an Omnicron Repulsor you control successfully defends against an attack by a Soulborg figure, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, the attacking figure must immediately end its turn and all order markers must be removed from its Army Card (or cards if your opponent has more than one Common Army Card for that figure).

powers.name: Combined Arbalest
powers.text: When attacking with a Protector of Ullar, roll 1 additional attack die for every wound that has been inflicted on the defending figure this turn by Protectors of Ullar you control.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for a Protector of Ullar's movement, ignore elevations. A Protector of Ullar may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. When a Protector of Ullar starts to fly, if he is engaged he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Dwarven Strategic Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with The Axegrinders of Burning Forge, you may first take a turn with any Dwarf Hero you control. If you do not take a turn with any Dwarf Hero you control, add 2 to the Axegrinders' move number.

powers.name: Fearless Advantage
powers.text: An Axegrinder of Burning Forge rolls an additional die when attacking or defending against large or huge figures.

powers.name: Climb X2
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, The Axegrinders of Burning Forge may double their Height.

powers.name: Blind Rage Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3. If Sir Hawthorne rolls at least 2 skulls with his Blind Rage Special Attack, Sir Hawthorne may attack again with his Blind Rage Special Attack. Sir Hawthorne may continue attacking with his Blind Rage Special Attack until he rolls fewer than 2 skulls.

powers.name: Stab in the Back
powers.text: After you take a turn with Sir Hawthorne, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1, choose an opponent. That opponent now controls Sir Hawthorne. Remove any order markers on this Army Card, then give the card to that opponent.

powers.name: Slither
powers.text: Elite Onyx Vipers do not have to stop their movement when entering water spaces.

powers.name: Frenzy
powers.text: After you take a turn with Elite Onyx Vipers, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher you may take another turn with Elite Onyx Vipers.

powers.name: Evasive
powers.text: When an Elite Onyx Viper rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, add 8 defense dice to the defending Viper.

powers.name: Rock Throw
powers.text: If a Granite Guardian has a height advantage on an opponent's figure, it may add 2 to its range when attacking that figure.

powers.name: Landslide
powers.text: A Granite Guardian with a height advantage on an adjacent opponent's figure rolls an additional attack die when attacking that figure.

powers.name: Gain High Ground
powers.text: After taking a turn with Granite Guardians, you may move each Granite Guardian you control up to 1 space. This space may be up to 4 levels higher.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Nerak is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Orc Defensive Aura 1
powers.text: All orc figures you control within 4 clear sight spaces of Nerak add 1 to their defense dice. Nerak's Orc Defensive Aura does not affect Nerak.

powers.name: Snow Strength
powers.text: Add 1 to Nerak's attack and defense while on a snow space.

powers.name: Feral Rage
powers.text: When a Quasatch Hunter attacks, it may attack up to 2 additional times. A Quasatch Hunter cannot attack the same figure more than once per turn.

powers.name: Techno Hatred
powers.text: When attacking a Soulborg figure, Quasatch Hunters receive 1 additional attack die.

powers.name: Jungle Tracking
powers.text: If a Quasatch Hunter begins its turn adjacent to an Evergreen Tree or Jungle Piece, it may move 2 additional spaces.

powers.name: SWIRLING VORTEX
powers.text: When an opponent's small or medium figure moves onto a space within 2 clear sight spaces of an Air Elemental you control, that figure must end its move there. Figures can never move through any figure affected by Swirling Vortex.

powers.name: AIR MASTERY
powers.text: Figures that have the Flying or Stealth Flying special power subtract 1 from their defense dice when attacked by an Air Elemental.

powers.name: STEALTH FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for an Air Elemental's movement, ignore elevations. An Air Elemental may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If an Air Elemental is engaged when it starts to fly, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Earth Slam Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 3. Any non-flying figure adjacent to this Earth Elemental is affected by Earth Slam Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense separately.

powers.name: Underground Movement
powers.text: Instead of moving normally with an Earth Elemental, you may immediately place it on any empty non-water space that is within 4 spaces of that Earth Elemental and no higher than 1 level above that Earth Elemental's height or 3 levels below that Earth Elemental's base. If an Earth Elemental is engaged when it starts its Underground Movement, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: VENOM RAY SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 3. If Estivara inflicts at least 1 wound with Venom Ray Special Attack, roll the 20-sided die for Venom Damage. If you roll a 1-9, the defending figure receives no additional wounds for Venom Damage. If you roll a 10-19, add 1 additional wound marker to the defending figure's Army Card, and roll again for Venom Damage. If you roll a 20, destroy the defending figure.

powers.name: LOLTH'S JUDGMENT AURA
powers.text: All Arachnid figures you control within 6 clear sight spaces of Estivara roll 1 additional attack die when attacking normally.

powers.name: CLOUD OF DARKNESS
powers.text: After taking a turn with Estivara, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, while she remains on that space, Estivara has no visible Hit Zone until the next time you reveal an order marker.

powers.name: Hydra Heads
powers.text: When this Fen Hydra attacks, it may attack up to 4 times. Reduce the number of times this Fen Hydra can attack by 1 for each wound marker on this Army Card.

powers.name: Reach
powers.text: If an opponent's figure is within 2 spaces of this Fen Hydra, and its base is no more than 3 levels above this Fen Hydra's height or 3 levels below this Fen Hydra's base, this Fen Hydra may add 1 to its Range when attacking that figure.

powers.name: Slither
powers.text: The Fen Hydra does not have to stop its movement when entering water spaces.

powers.name: LAVA RESISTANT
powers.text: A Fire Elemental never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and it does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

powers.name: SEARING INTENSITY
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you must roll the 20-sided die once for each figure adjacent to at least one Fire Elemental you control. If you roll a 14 or higher, that figure receives 1 wound. Figures with the Lava Resistant special power are not affected by Searing Intensity

powers.name: NEGATIVE ELEMENT
powers.text: A Fire Elemental can never roll defense dice while it is on a water space.

powers.name: ICE COLD
powers.text: While a Greater Ice Elemental is on a water or ice space, that space and all same-level water spaces adjacent to that Greater Ice Elemental are considered normal ice spaces. Figures do not have to stop their movement on normal ice spaces.

powers.name: ICE SPIKES 15
powers.text: If an opponent's figure moves adjacent to this Greater Ice Elemental, roll the 20-sided die. If this Greater Ice Elemental is on at least one ice or snow space, add 2 to your die roll. If you roll a 15 or higher, the opponent's figure receives 1 wound. Figures can be affected by Ice Spikes only as they move into engagement with this Greater Ice Elemental.

powers.name: COLD HEALING
powers.text: After taking a turn with this Greater Ice Elemental, if it is on at least one snow or ice space, remove 1 wound marker from this Greater Ice Elemental's Army Card.

powers.name: Loyalty to the Lizard King
powers.text: At the start of the game, choose a Unique Lizardfolk Hero you control, or a Unique large or huge Dragon Hero you control, to be the Greenscale Warriors' Lizard King. A Greenscale Warrior rolls 1 additional attack and defense die when its chosen Lizard King is within 2 clear sight spaces. You can choose only one Lizard King for all the Greenscale Warriors you control.

powers.name: Lizard King Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Greenscale Warriors, you may first take a turn with their chosen Lizard King if it is still under your control.

powers.name: Combat Leader
powers.text: If at least one order marker is on Mogrimm Forgehammer, you may add 3 to your initiative roll.

powers.name: Commander's Strike
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with Mogrimm Forgehammer, you may choose any opponent's figure within 5 clear sight spaces that is engaged with any other figure you control. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 15 or higher, the chosen figure receives 1 wound.

powers.name: Tough
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal attack, Mogrimm Forgehammer always adds 1 automatic shield to whatever is rolled.

powers.name: Insubstantial 3
powers.text: A Phantom Knight adds 3 additional defense dice when rolling defense against a normal attack from a figure who is not adjacent.

powers.name: Stealth Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for a Phantom Knight's movement, ignore elevations. A Phantom Knight may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Phantom Knight is engaged when it starts to fly, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Blood Frenzy
powers.text: When attacking with a Sahuagin Raider, it receives 1 extra attack die for each wound marker on the defending figure's Army Card to a maximum of 3 additional attack dice for Blood Frenzy.

powers.name: Amphibious
powers.text: While a Sahuagin Raider is on a water space, add 2 to its Defense. If a Sahuagin Raider starts its turn on a water space, add 1 to its movement for that turn. A Sahuagin Raider does not have to stop its movement when entering a water space.

powers.name: Arcane Bolt Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5 + Special Attack 3. The first target of Arcane Bolt Special Attack must be within a Range of 5. After attacking with Arcane Bolt Special Attack, if the defending figure receives at least 1 wound, you may choose a figure that was adjacent to the defending figure at the beginning of that attack and attack that chosen figure with Arcane Bolt Special Attack. You may continue attacking with Arcane Bolt Special Attack in this manner until you fail to inflict a wound. A figure cannot be attacked more than once in a turn with Arcane Bolt Special Attack.

powers.name: Arcane Riposte
powers.text: When Sharwin Wildborn rolls defense dice against a normal attack, all excess shields count as unblockable hits on the attacking figure.

powers.name: Shocking Grasp
powers.text: When rolling attack dice for a normal attack, Sharwin Wildborn always adds 1 automatic skull to whatever is rolled.

powers.name: BATTLEAXE
powers.text: If Torin is attacking a small or medium figure, add 2 dice to Torin's attack.

powers.name: EVIL EYE PROTECTION
powers.text: When Torin, or any friendly small or medium Utgar figure adjacent to Torin, rolls defense dice against a normal attack from a non-adjacent attacking figure, all excess shields count as unblockable hits inflicted by Torin on the attacking figure.

powers.name: WATER MASTERY
powers.text: While a Water Elemental is on a water space, add 1 to its Attack and Defense.

powers.name: WATER TUNNEL
powers.text: If a Water Elemental ends its normal movement on a water space, you may immediately place it on any empty same-level water space within 5 spaces. If a Water Elemental is engaged when it starts its Water Tunnel, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Talon Grab
powers.text: While this Wyvern is flying, you may choose one opponent's small or medium figure that it passed over this turn. Place the chosen figure on an empty same-level space adjacent to this Wyvern at the end of its move. If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Talon Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks. Figures under overhangs can never be moved by Talon Grab.

powers.name: Venomous Sting
powers.text: When rolling attack dice, if this Wyvern rolls a skull on every die, the defending figure cannot roll any defense dice. Venomous Sting does not affect destructible objects.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for a Wyvern's movement, ignore elevations. A Wyvern may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Wyvern is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Flail Hurricane
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with this Ogre Warhulk, you must roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-10, it may attack normally. If you roll an 11 or higher, instead of attacking normally, it must attack each figure adjacent to it, if possible. Roll each attack separately.

powers.name: Mine!
powers.text: When you roll the 20-sided die for a Treasure Glyph trap with this Ogre Warhulk, you must subtract 4 from your die roll.

powers.name: Fledgling Fires Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 3. Common Squad figures roll 2 fewer defense dice against Fledgling Fires Special Attack.

powers.name: Wyrmling Bonding
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on a Red Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Red Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for a Red Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A Red Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Red Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Dragon Breath Special Attack
powers.text: Range Special Attack 3. Choose 3 spaces in a straight line from Rhogar Dragonspine. All figures on those spaces that are in line of sight are affected by Dragon Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

powers.name: Lay On Hands
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with Rhogar Dragonspine, you may choose a wounded friendly Hero figure adjacent to Rhogar Dragonspine and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 6 or higher, remove 1 wound marker from the chosen figure's Army Card.

powers.name: SWEEPING SWORD SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 5. Choose a figure to attack. Any figures adjacent to both Shurrak and the chosen figure are also affected by Sweeping Sword Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately.

powers.name: KNOCKBACK 14
powers.text: When a small or medium figure rolls defense dice and is not destroyed by a normal or special attack from Shurrak, immediately roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may move the figure by placing it on any empty space within 3 clear sight spaces of Shurrak. The space must be on the same level as or lower than its current location. A figure moved by Knockback never takes any leaving engagement attacks. A non-flying figure moved lower by Knockback can receive any falling damage that may apply.

powers.name: LAVA RESISTANT
powers.text: Shurrak never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and he does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

powers.name: Tactical Switch
powers.text: When a Warforged Soldier you control attacks an opponent's small or medium figure, before rolling the attack dice, you may switch that Warforged Soldier with the defending figure. After switching spaces, the Warforged Soldier must continue that attack, if possible, and cannot attack any other figure this turn. Figures moved by Tactical Switch never take any leaving engagement attacks. An opponent's figure may be moved by Tactical Switch only once per turn.

powers.name: Warforged Resolve
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a normal or special attack, a Warforged Soldier always adds 1 automatic shield to whatever is rolled

powers.name: Lycanthropy
powers.text: This Werewolf Lord starts the game with 3 green Lycanthropy markers on its Army Card. If an opponent's Unique Hero receives at least 1 wound from this Werewolf Lord, you may place a Lycanthropy marker on that figure's Army Card. For the duration of the game, that figure loses its Species, Class, and Personality. Instead, it has the following characteristics: • Species: Hybrid • Class: Hunter • Personality: Tormented. Lycanthropy never affects Constructs, Lycanthropes, Soulborgs, and destructible objects.

powers.name: Moon Frenzy
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on this Werewolf Lord, before taking this Werewolf Lord's turn, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 11 or higher, you may first take a turn with any Hybrid Hero in play. If you take a turn with an opponent's Hybrid Hero, you control that hero for the duration of its turn. At the end of its turn, control of the Hybrid Hero returns to its previous owner. All order markers that were on that figure's Army Card will stay on the Army Card.

powers.name: Fledgling Ice Shards Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5, Attack 2. When a White Wyrmling attacks with its Fledgling Ice Shards Special Attack, it may attack 1 additional time. It cannot attack the same figure more than once this turn

powers.name: Wyrmling Bonding
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on a White Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that White Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for a White Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A White Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, may pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a White Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Fledgling Acid Breath
powers.text: Instead of attacking with a Black Wyrmling, you may choose one small or medium figure within 4 clear sight spaces of it. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 1-10, nothing happens. If you roll an 11-15, the chosen figure receives 1 wound. If you roll a 16 or higher, the chosen figure receives 2 wounds.

powers.name: Wyrmling Bonding
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on a Black Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Black Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

powers.name: Flying
powers.text: When counting spaces for a Black Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A Black Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Black Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: FLEDGLING LIGHTNING BREATH SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 4 + Special Attack 2. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose one other figure within 3 clear sight spaces of the targeted figure to be affected by Fledgling Lightning Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for both figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Fledgling Lightning Breath Special Attack does not affect indestructible objects.

powers.name: WYRMLING BONDING
powers.text: After revealing an order marker on a Blue Wyrmling Army Card, before taking that Blue Wyrmling's turn, you may take a turn with one other Wyrmling you control.

powers.name: FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for a Blue Wyrmling's movement, ignore elevations. A Blue Wyrmling may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If a Blue Wyrmling is engaged when it starts to fly, it will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: MOB ATTACK
powers.text: When attacking with a Goblin Cutter you control, if the defending figure is engaged with at least 2 other Goblin Cutters you control, it subtracts 2 from its defense dice.

powers.name: SCURRY
powers.text: When a Goblin Cutter you control is destroyed by a normal attack from an opponent's figure, you may move any 2 Goblin Cutters you control up to 4 spaces each, and all Goblin Cutters you control no longer have any visible Hit Zones for the duration of the attacking figure's turn while they remain unengaged. Goblin Cutters will never take any leaving engagement attacks while using Scurry.

powers.name: SCALE
powers.text: When moving up or down levels of terrain, Goblin Cutters may add 2 to their height.

powers.name: Iron Tough
powers.text: When rolling defense dice against a special attack, this Iron Golem always adds 2 automatic shields to whatever is rolled.

powers.name: Lava Resistant
powers.text: This Iron Golem never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and it does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

powers.name: SHADOW AMBUSH
powers.text: If Mika Connour starts her turn unengaged and on a shadow space, add 3 dice to her attack this turn.

powers.name: SHADOW DANCE
powers.text: If Mika Connour starts her turn on a shadow space, instead of moving normally, you may place her on any other empty shadow space within 8 spaces of her current location. If Mika Connour is engaged when she starts her Shadow Dance, she will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: BLEND INTO SHADOW
powers.text: Mika Connour starts each game with up to 2 shadow tiles on her Army Card. If Mika Connour ends her turn on an empty land space, you may place a shadow tile from her Army Card onto the space she occupies if the shadow tile fits normally onto that space.

powers.name: Expendable Rabble
powers.text: If a Horned Skull Brute you control is attacked with a normal attack by an opponent's figure and receives 1 or more wounds, you may destroy a small Goblin figure you control that is adjacent to that Horned Skull Brute to ignore any wounds that Horned Skull Brute just received.

powers.name: Barge Into Battle
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, if a Horned Skull Brute you control ends its movement unengaged, you may choose an engaged small or medium friendly Squad figure within 3 clear sight spaces of that Horned Skull Brute whose base is no more than 2 levels higher or lower than the base of that Horned Skull Brute. You may switch that Horned Skull Brute with the chosen Squad figure. Figures moved by Barge into Battle never take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Ice Troll Charge
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with this Ice Troll Berserker, roll the 20-sided die. If this Ice Troll Berserker is on a snow or ice space, add 3 to your die roll. If you roll a 13 or higher, you may move this Ice Troll Berserker again.

powers.name: Cold Regenerate
powers.text: After taking a turn with this Ice Troll Berserker, remove 1 wound marker from this Ice Troll Berserker's Army Card. If it is on a snow or ice space, remove 1 additional wound marker.

powers.name: Mortal Strike
powers.text: After attacking an opponent's Unique Hero with this Master of the Hunt's normal attack, roll 1 attack die for each wound inflicted in that attack. For each additional skull rolled, place 1 additional wound marker on the defending figure's Army Card.

powers.name: Javelin
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with this Master of the Hunt, you may roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, add 3 to this Master of the Hunt's Range value for the duration of its turn.

powers.name: Poison Cloud
powers.text: When a Mezzodemon Warmonger attacks a Common figure, add 1 to its Attack value.

powers.name: Exoskeleton
powers.text: At the start of the game, place 1 copper Exoskeleton marker on a Mezzodemon Warmongers Army Card for each Mezzodemon Warmonger figure in your Army. After a Mezzodemon Warmonger rolls defense dice against a normal attack, you may remove 1 Exoskeleton marker from its Army Card to ignore all wounds inflicted by that attack.

powers.name: BURNING BREATH SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 4 + Special. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose 4 spaces in a straight line from the targeted figure. All figures on those spaces that are within line of sight of Moltenclaw are affected by Burning Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Moltenclaw is not affected by Burning Breath Special Attack.

powers.name: LAVA RESISTANT
powers.text: Moltenclaw never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and he does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

powers.name: FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for Moltenclaw's movement, ignore elevations. Moltenclaw may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If Moltenclaw is engaged when he starts to fly, he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Double Attack
powers.text: When this Ogre Pulverizer attacks, it may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Lumbering Bully
powers.text: When attacking with this Ogre Pulverizer, all excess shields rolled by the defending figure count as unblockable hits inflicted by the defending figure on this Ogre Pulverizer.

powers.name: Crag of Steel
powers.text: When revealing a numbered order marker on Siege's Army Card, you may also reveal an "X" order marker that is on Siege's Army Card to activate Crag of Steel for the duration of the round. While Crag of Steel is active, add 3 to Siege's Defense value and subtract 2 from Siege's Attack and Move values. When Siege attacks while Crag of Steel is active, he may attack any or all figures adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

powers.name: Taskmaster Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Death Chasers of Thesk, you may first take a turn with any large wild Hero you control.

powers.name: Orc Battle Rush
powers.text: At the start of the first round of the game, after all order markers have been placed, you may move all Death Chasers of Thesk you control up to 5 spaces each. They must end their Orc Battle Rush movement on an empty space.

powers.name: Soul Weapons
powers.text: Figures attacked by a Death Knight of Valkrill subtract 2 from their defense dice. Destructible objects are not affected by Soul Weapons.

powers.name: Unholy Bonding
powers.text: Before taking a turn with the Death Knights of Valkrill, you may first take a turn with any small, medium, or large relentless Hero you control.

powers.name: THUNDER RAM ASSAULT SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 1 + Special Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose up to two other figures within 2 clear sight spaces of the targeted figure to be affected by Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. You can only use Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack if Eltahale was not adjacent to the targeted figure at the start of this turn. You cannot use Thunder Ram Assault Special Attack if you used Thunder Step this turn.

powers.name: THUNDER STEP
powers.text: Instead of moving Eltahale normally, you may choose an opponent's figure within 5 clear sight spaces of Eltahale. Place Eltahale on any empty space adjacent to the chosen figure. For the duration of Eltahale's turn, add 1 to her Attack value. At the end of her turn, roll 1 attack die. If a skull is rolled, place 1 wound marker on Eltahale's Army Card. If Eltahale is engaged when she starts Thunder Step, she will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Double Assault
powers.text: When Evar Scarcarver attacks an adjacent figure or destructible object, he may attack one additional time.

powers.name: Frost Rage
powers.text: When revealing a numbered order marker on Evar Scarcarver's Army Card, you may also reveal an "X" order marker that is on Evar Scarcarver's Army Card to activate Frost Rage for the duration of the round. While Frost Rage is active, add 1 to Evar Scarcarver's Attack and Defense values for each wound marker on his Army Card.

powers.name: BURNING BREATH SPECIAL ATTACK
powers.text: Range 4 + Special. Attack 4. Choose a figure to attack. You may also choose 4 spaces in a straight line from the targeted figure. All figures on those spaces that are within line of sight of Moltenclaw are affected by Burning Breath Special Attack. Roll attack dice once for all affected figures. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Moltenclaw is not affected by Burning Breath Special Attack.

powers.name: LAVA RESISTANT
powers.text: Moltenclaw never rolls for molten lava damage or lava field damage, and he does not have to stop on molten lava spaces.

powers.name: FLYING
powers.text: When counting spaces for Moltenclaw's movement, ignore elevations. Moltenclaw may fly over water without stopping, pass over figures without becoming engaged, and fly over obstacles such as ruins. If Moltenclaw is engaged when he starts to fly, he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: VILLAINOUS BONDING
powers.text: Before taking a turn with COBRA Troopers, you may first take a turn with a Warlord or Profiteer Hero you control.

powers.name: COILS OF COBRA
powers.text: COBRA Troopers add 1 to their Attack Value for each adjacent Unique Cobra figure you control.

powers.name: CUTLASSSS OF COBRA
powers.text: COBRA Commander adds 1 automatic skull when attacking adjacent figures.

powers.name: I'LL GET YOU NEXT TIME
powers.text: After COBRA Commander receives 1 or more wounds from a normal attack and is not destroyed, you may move COBRA Commander up to 2 spaces. He may not end this movement adjacent to an enemy figure. While moving with I'll Get You Next Time, COBRA Commander does not take leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Intelligence Chief
powers.text: The first time each round you reveal a numbered Order Marker on this Army Card, instead of taking a turn with Baroness you may take a turn with up to 2 different COBRA or Agent Heroes you control. Baroness can be one of those Heroes.

powers.name: False Orders 16
powers.text: At the end of Baroness' turn, you may choose an enemy figure within 6 clear sight spaces and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may look at an Order Marker on that figure's Army Card. You may then move that Order Marker to the Army Card of another of that player's figures which is within 6 clear sight spaces of Baroness.

powers.name: Disengage
powers.text: Baroness never takes leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Air-to-Ground Missile Special Attack
powers.text: Range 4. Explosion 1. Attack 3.

powers.name: Battle Ready
powers.text: Before you reveal a numbered Order Marker on another Army Card in your Army, you may reveal the "X" Order Marker on Cobra Flight Pod. If you do, move that numbered Order Marker to this Army Card and reveal it.

powers.name: ONE TWIN FEELS WHAT THE OTHER TWIN FEELS
powers.text: The Crimson Twins share a Life Pool. Put all Wound Markers either Twin receives on this Army Card. Both Twins are destroyed when this Army Card has Wound Markers equal to its Life Value. This special power cannot be negated.

powers.name: BANKROLL
powers.text: At the start of the game, you may choose one Unique Hero in your Army. For this game, that figure's Affiliation is COBRA, regardless of what it says on the figure's Army Card.

powers.name: BUSINESS OPERATIONS
powers.text: After a Crimson Twin attacks with a normal attack, you may move another unengaged COBRA figure you control up to 2 spaces.

powers.name: YO, JOE!
powers.text: The first time each round you reveal a numbered Order Marker on this Army Card, instead of taking a turn with Duke you may take a turn with up to 2 G.I. JOE or Soldier Heroes you control. Duke can be one of those Heroes.

powers.name: LEAD BY EXAMPLE
powers.text: While Duke has a revealed Order Marker on his Army Card, other G.I. JOE and Soldier figures you control within 2 clear sight spaces of Duke add 1 to their Attack Value.

powers.name: Gunrunner
powers.text: At the start of the game, you may place up to 2 different Tech Glyphs power-side up onto the Army Cards of up to 2 different Unique Heroes in your Army.

powers.name: Beryllium Steel Mask
powers.text: Destro adds 1 automatic shield to his defense rolls against attacks from non-adjacent figures.

powers.name: Personal Arsenal
powers.text: Once per turn, after making a normal attack, Destro may reduce his Attack Value by 2 and make an additional normal attack.

powers.name: A Little Suggestion
powers.text: At the start of Doctor Mindbender's turn, you may move all friendly figures adjacent to Doctor Mindbender up to 3 spaces.

powers.name: Bend Mind 13
powers.text: At the end of Doctor Mindbender's turn, you may choose an enemy Unique figure within 3 spaces of Doctor Mindbender and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 13 or higher after this turn you may reveal the "X" Order Marker on Doctor Mindbender. If you do, take temporary control of the enemy Army Card and take a turn with it. After the turn, control returns to the Army Card's previous owner.

powers.name: Learn from the Master
powers.text: After revealing an Order Marker on and before taking a turn with this Squad, you may first take a turn with a Ninja Hero you control.

powers.name: Coordinated Takedown
powers.text: While attacking, roll 1 additional attack die for each other friendly Ninja adjacent to the target.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Members of this Squad can move through all figures and never take leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Motorized Zipline
powers.text: Start the game with 3 Zipline Glyphs on this card. Before and after moving normally, you may place up to 1 Zipline Glyph on an empty space within 1 clear sight space of Lady Jaye.

powers.name: Master of Disguise 14
powers.text: The first time each turn that Lady Jaye is targeted for an attack by a Squad figure, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, Lady Jaye cannot be targeted by that attack or any other attacks this turn.

powers.name: Machine Gun Special Attack
powers.text: Range 5. Attack 3. Roadblock may attack up to 3 times with Machine Gun Special Attack. He cannot attack the same target more than once each turn.

powers.name: NANITE SMOKE GRENADE
powers.text: Start the game with 3 shadow tiles on this Army Card. At the end of Storm Shadow's turn, you may place a shadow tile from this card onto the battlefield within 3 clear sight spaces of Storm Shadow if the tile fits normally there.

powers.name: WHIRLWIND ASSAULT
powers.text: Storm Shadow may attack any number of times during his turn. He cannot attack any figure more than once per turn.

powers.name: PHANTOM WALK
powers.text: Storm Shadow can move through all figures and never takes leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: NOW YOU KNOW
powers.text: At the start of the round, after rolling Initiative, you may look at all unrevealed Order Markers on 1 enemy Army Card. Then you may move 1 Order Marker from a G.I. JOE or Soldier Army Card you control to another G.I. JOE or Soldier Army Card you control.

powers.name: KNOWING IS HALF THE BATTLE
powers.text: When Scarlett makes an attack, the target figure loses Defense Value by 1 for every revealed Order Marker on its Army Card.

powers.name: LETHAL TO THE BONE
powers.text: Once per turn, after attacking, you may move Scarlett up to 2 spaces and make 1 normal attack against an adjacent figure.

powers.name: Assassinate 2
powers.text: Snake Eyes adds 2 to his Attack Value when attacking an enemy figure that is not adjacent to any other enemy figures.

powers.name: Evasive 2
powers.text: Snake Eyes increases his Defense Value by 2 when defending against a non-adjacent figure.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Snake Eyes can move through all figures and never takes leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Master's Influence
powers.text: All Monk Squad figures you control may leap an additional 13 levels up or down when using their Stealth Leap special power. All Monks you control within 2 clear sight spaces of Master Woo add 1 to their attack dice and 1 to their defense dice.

powers.name: Master's Assault
powers.text: Master Woo may attack any or all figures adjacent to him. Roll each attack separately.

powers.name: Stealth Leap 25
powers.text: Instead of his normal move, Master Woo may use Stealth Leap 25. Stealth Leap 25 has a move of 3. When counting spaces for Stealth Leap 25, ignore elevations. Master Woo may leap over water without stopping, leap over figures without becoming engaged, and leap over obstacles such as ruins. Master Woo may not leap more than 25 levels up or down in a single leap. If Master Woo is engaged when he starts his Stealth Leap 25, he will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: DOUBLE ATTACK
powers.text: When Agent Skahen attacks, she may attack one additional time.

powers.name: COVER FIRE
powers.text: When attacking an opponent's figure, if Agent Skahen inflicts one or more wounds, you may move one Tricky figure you control who follows Vydar and is within 8 clear sight spaces of Agent Skahen up to 4 spaces. You cannot use Cover Fire to move Agent Skahen.

powers.name: STEALTH DODGE
powers.text: When Agent Skahen rolls defense dice against an attacking figure who is not adjacent, one shield will block all damage.

powers.name: Thorian Speed
powers.text: Opponents' figures must be adjacent to Sgt. Drake Alexander to attack him with a normal attack.

powers.name: Grapple Grab 8
powers.text: After moving and before attacking with Drake, you may choose one enemy Small or Medium figure within 4 clear sight spaces whose level is no more than 6 levels above or below Drake's level. Roll the 20-sided die. If you roll an 8 or higher, place the chosen figure on any empty same-level space adjacent to Drake. If the chosen figure is engaged when it is moved by Grapple Grab, it will not take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Ninjutsu Mastery Special Attack
powers.text: Range 1. Attack 2 + Special. If Shiori did not move normally, she may attack with Ninjutsu Mastery Special Attack up to three times. Before each attack, you must choose an enemy figure within 2 clear sight spaces (but Shiori not more than 6 levels above or below Shiori's level, and place her on an empty space adjacent to that figure. When attacking with Ninjutsu Mastery Special Attack, Shiori rolls 2 attack dice, or 3 attack dice if Shiori has exactly one unrevealed Order Marker on her Army Card.

powers.name: Kieru 14
powers.text: If Shiori is attacked with a normal or special attack and receives 1 or more wounds, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may place Shiori on an empty space within 2 spaces of Shiori that is not more than 6 levels above or below Shiori's level. If you do, ignore all wounds just received.

powers.name: Phantom Walk
powers.text: Shiori can move through all figures and is never attacked when leaving an engagement.

powers.name: Underground Movement
powers.text: Instead of moving normally with the Decker the Burrowbreaker, you may place him onto an empty non-water space within 4 spaces of Decker that is no higher than 6 levels above or 3 levels below Decker's level. If Decker is engaged when he starts his Underground Movement, he will take any leaving engagement attacks.

powers.name: Drill-Drive Special Attack
powers.text: Range Special. Attack 4. Instead of moving and attacking normally with Decker, you may move him up to 5 spaces in a straight line. When moving with Drill-Drive Special Attack, Decker may pass through figures and does not take leaving engagement attacks from figures he passed through that turn. After moving, roll attack dice once for all figures passed through that turn. Each figure rolls defense dice separately. Defending figures never have height advantage against Drill-Drive Special Attack.

powers.name: Full Barrage Special Attack
powers.text: Range Special. Attack Special. When using Full Barrage Special Attack, Major Q11 may attack up to 3 times. Each attack must target a different figure and must use a different Range and Attack Value pair from the list below (in any order): • Range 7, Attack 2. • Range 5, Attack 3. • Range 3, Attack 4. Major Q11 cannot target the same figure more than once per turn with Full Barrage Special Attack.

powers.name: Vydar's Hammer
powers.text: When Major Q11 attacks an adjacent figure with a normal attack, you may choose one Small, Medium, or Large figure that is adjacent to the defending figure. If the defending figure receives any wounds from Major Q11's attack, the chosen figure receives one wound.

powers.name: Maddening Chitter 14
powers.text: Once per round, before taking a turn with Thyraxis Dragoon, you may choose an enemy figure within 6 clear sight spaces of Thyraxis and roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 14 or higher, you may look at one unrevealed Order Marker on that figure's Army Card. You may then choose any other figure controlled by the same player and move the Order Marker to that figure's Army Card.

powers.name: Battle Frenzy 16
powers.text: After attacking with Thyraxis Dragoon, roll the 20-sided die. If you roll a 16 or higher, you may attack again with Thyraxis.

powers.name: DOUBLE ATTACK
powers.text: Once per turn, after attacking with Serpentor, he may make 1 additional normal attack.

powers.name: CRUELLY FOR ITS OWN SAKE
powers.text: Figures adjacent to Serpentor subtract 1 from their Defense Value.

powers.name: I'LL DO IT MYSELF
powers.text: Once per round, before you reveal a numbered Order Marker on an Army Card in your Army, you may move that Order Marker to Serpentor and reveal it.

powers.name: Volley Unto Himself
powers.text: After moving and before attacking, you may reduce Syvarris' Range Value to 6 to make up to 2 normal attacks this turn. Or, you may reduce it to 3 to make up to 3 normal attacks this turn.
